programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Reform
programme.desc: The district is in a state of change, Lindsay has moved to New York and the CPD is under scrutiny about the corrupt nature of its institution. The team attempts to bust a gun deal that quickly turns dicey when innocent people get involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Thing About Heroes
programme.desc: After a van explodes during a Chicago street festival, Muslim patrol officer Frank Toma goes missing and evidence piles up pointing to his involvement, but Burgess is desperate to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Promise
programme.desc: When a young Latina woman is brutally murdered, Intelligence suspects she may have been working as a drug mule.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Snitch
programme.desc: While investigating a drug related homicide, Intelligence is stonewalled by the 'no snitch' culture of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Home
programme.desc: When Intelligence busts a meth lab run by gang leader Marshall Carter, they uncover a rehoming scam in which children adopted from foreign countries are abandoned, then sold online.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick
programme.desc: An ex-hit man awakens one night to find his home invaded by members of the Russian mob, who beat him, steal his car and kill his beloved dog. With the most important thing in his life taken away from him, he comes out of retirement to exact vengeance.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: John Wick is brought out of retirement again by a former associate that plans to take over a shadowy international assassin's guild. Forced by a blood oath to help, Wick heads to Rome and faces off against hordes of deadly killers and assassins.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pawtucket Pete
programme.desc: The Pawtucket Brewery hires new bosses, who decide to change the company's mascot. In an attempt to be crowned the new face of Pawtucket Ale, Peter and Brian go head-to-head.

programme.title: Family Guy: Stand by Meg
programme.desc: After Meg saves Stewie from a choking incident, Stewie makes it his personal mission to create a better life for Meg. Meanwhile, Chris is sent to a vocational school.

programme.title: Family Guy: Trump Guy
programme.desc: The Griffins move to Washington D.C. where Peter is hired as the new White House Press Secretary.

programme.title: Family Guy: Bri, Robot
programme.desc: Brian worries about the legacy he's leaving behind, so Stewie makes a robot duplicate as a living biography.

programme.title: Family Guy: Regarding Carter
programme.desc: Lois receives a surprising birthday present from her father, Carter Pewterschmidt, that leads to an unfortunate accident leaving him dependent on Lois and the Griffin’s care.

programme.title: Family Guy: Family Guy Lite
programme.desc: After a mishap at work, Peter decides to take his health more seriously and diet with the help of Quagmire, Joe, and Cleveland. Meanwhile, takes a stab at writing a romantic fantasy novel.

programme.title: Family Guy: No Giggity, No Doubt
programme.desc: When the guys volunteer to chaperone the high school prom, Quagmire hits it off with Courtney only to discover that she is his daughter. To his and the gang's surprise, Quagmire makes a serious effort to embrace parenting Courtney.

programme.title: Family Guy: You Can't Handle the Booth
programme.desc: In a special episode, the Griffins provide DVD commentary on a recent episode and reveal never-before-told drama between Peter and Lois.

programme.title: Family Guy: Island Adventure
programme.desc: In search of Stewie's cherished big wheel tricycle, that Peter threw out, Stewie and Brian embark on an adventure to 'Garbage Island,' a giant floating mass of trash out in the sea. Meanwhile, Lois tries to help Quagmire elevate his dating game.

programme.title: Family Guy: Throw It Away
programme.desc: After Lois reads a new book on the joys of decluttering, she challenges the rest of the Griffins to throw anything out of the house that does not spark joy. While all starts out well, Lois soon takes the decluttering to a surprising extreme.

programme.title: Family Guy: Girl, Internetted
programme.desc: When Meg suddenly becomes internet famous, she and an excited Peter work together to build her following and create content for her new image that revolves around unhealthy eating.

programme.title: Family Guy: Adam West High
programme.desc: When Brian's proposition to rename Quahog's high school 'Adam West High,' to honour the late Mayor West, is successful, he feels encouraged to run for office as Quahog's new mayor. The race takes a turn when Quagmire campaigns against Brian.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A magazine program featuring current events as seen from a Christian perspective, as well as testimonies of changed lives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fland Canyon
programme.desc: Homer recalls a tense family vacation to the Grand Canyon with the Flanders family. At first, the Flanders' perfection puts the families at odds, but when they get stranded and Ned and Bart go for help, the families finally bond.

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Courier With Love
programme.desc: After promising Marge the trip of a lifetime, frugality gets the better of Homer when he makes a deal with a travel agent to be a courier of a top-secret briefcase in exchange for a discounted family vacation to Paris.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simprovised
programme.desc: After butchering a speech in front of all of his friends at work, Homer turns to improv comedy to gain back his confidence in his public speaking skills. Meanwhile, Marge decides to rebuild Bart's lacklustre treehouse.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Orange Is the New Yellow
programme.desc: When Marge gets arrested for letting Bart go to the park unsupervised, she serves time only to realize that prison is a welcome break from the demands of her life as a mom and wife. In her absence, Homer tries to manage the parenting responsibilities.

programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael and Pam continue their tour of the branches with Michael taking a lesson from their visit to Utica. Dwight and Jim struggle to fulfill their new party planning duties with a grumpy staff. Meanwhile, Angela's new cat causes a stir.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Phoenix Rising
programme.desc: The team helps Korsak investigate an old case that has gone very, very cold. Jane refuses to believe that she's not ready to go back on duty and takes some untraditional steps to stay involved.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: You Can't Stand the Heat
programme.desc: In the middle of a heatwave, Jane and Maura find a man who died suspiciously in a bathtub full of ice. In trying to stay cool, Angela discovers a spicy tea that seems to be working but has unexpected romantic consequences.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Burden of Proof
programme.desc: A notable county prosecutor is arrested for murder. As the case against him grows increasingly strong, Jane begin to doubt he did it. Meanwhile, Angela nominates herself to educate Maura on the interests of kids today.

programme.title: Cellmates Secrets: Drew Peterson
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Drew's ex-fiancé reveals a shocking revelation relating to his fourth wife, Stacy's, disappearance.

programme.title: Movie: The Client List
programme.desc: A former Texas homecoming queen inadvertently finds herself in the middle of a prostitution ring after unknowingly accepting a position at a massage parlor.

programme.title: Movie: Secrets of a Marine's Wife
programme.desc: Based on the true story of 19-year-old Erin Corwin, who was married to U.S. Marine Corporal Jon Corwin and expecting her first child, when she suddenly went missing.

programme.title: Movie: Stalked by My Husband's Ex
programme.desc: A newly engaged woman begins to suspect her husband's ex isn't gone for good.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Backcountry Backstabber
programme.desc: After a woman is viciously slain in her country home, police are stumped as to who could have had a vendetta against the kind and generous woman.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Big Easy Black Widow

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm
programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Million Dollar Gamble

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Arizona Crush

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Captaincy
programme.desc: Danger lurks on the ship as Emily falls overboard and a faulty sluice box falls on Scott Foster's head.

programme.desc: The Raneys rush to a failing homestead in Colorado where they find husband Don makes a 40-mile mountain commute each day, leaving his wife alone, terrified to leave the house because it's surrounded by bears and mountain lions.

programme.desc: The Raneys face an emotional rescue of young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama. To save the legacy of an 8th generation family property, they must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Mississippi Mayhem
programme.desc: In Mississippi, the Raneys must first solve the mystery of flooding water before teaching a family of six to thrive off-grid together. Builds include a new Elvis-inspired 'Heartbreak Goat-tel. goat pen, garden compound and metal forge.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Hidden Secrets!
programme.desc: Zach and Tori have concerns about Jackson's bowing legs. Chris tells Amy that she must make room for him in the house if she hopes to set a wedding date. Matt finishes his 'treasure capsule' sandbox.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: The Reason for the Madness
programme.desc: 2020 brings challenges for the Roloffs that could derail pumpkin season. Matt hopes Zach can take on more duties, but they butt heads while trying to work together. Meanwhile, Amy struggles to deal with her new role as employee rather than owner.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Bromance
programme.desc: Zach contemplates his future on the farm as pumpkin season comes to a close, and the parental roller coaster continues as he and Tori deal with Lilah's eye issue. Amy and Chris host soup night and share some big news, and Caryn also has big news to share.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Bad Energy

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Matt/ Sarah
programme.desc: To afford his dream of becoming a pro-wrestler, Matt has reduced his spending to just $300 a month. Extreme Cheapskate Sarah saves on groceries by never leaving one of her family's catering events without leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Nobody Pays Retail
programme.desc: Lydia Abate scours the obituaries, then visits surviving family members in hopes of taking the deceased person's clothing off of their hands. Mason Roberts introduces his wife to his entire family of cheapskates.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Terence/ Greg
programme.desc: Terence and Greg cause friction when others rebel against their bare-bones budgets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: In Sickness and in Wealth
programme.desc: Extreme Cheapskates Karen and Barry cannot stand the idea of spending money. Whether it's frying breakfast on the car engine or pulling out their own tooth at home, no task is too big and no savings too small.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jordan/ Michael
programme.desc: Utah housewife Jordan manages to only spend $1400 a month for her family of five by rationing everything and asking her neighbors for their leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Home is Where the Cart Is
programme.desc: Flight attendant Steffanie takes her boyfriend to the Unclaimed Baggage Center in hopes of pushing their relationship to the next level. Professional doorman RJ Andrews has no fixed address but lives rent-free by house sitting 365 days a year.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The O'Briens
programme.desc: The O'Briens refuse to buy anything new, and instead find ingenious ways of fixing their broken belongings. Aimee's total net worth is $5.3 million, but she refuses to spend more than $1,000 a month.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Spider House

programme.desc: Scott buys a house that was home to over a dozen tenants who kept the house in such poor condition that some of its peskier inhabitants still remain.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Halfway House
programme.desc: Keith locates a historic home that was only half-way re-done and at a price that would make flipping it highly profitable. Beneath the surface, however, a ton of problems become apparent, including outdated electrical, crooked floor and more.

programme.title: Sell This House!: Runaway Roswell Realtors
programme.desc: James and Lyn purchased their Roswell, Georgia house 30 years ago, raised three sons, and know it's time to move on. Six realtors have refused to list the home unless serious changes are made. Still, the couple is resistant to making any updates.

programme.title: Sell This House!: Mess in Marietta
programme.desc: Jordan and his brothers inherited their father's home after his sudden passing last year, and they're now stuck with an unsellable house. Tanya has three days to take the house out of the 80's and entice potential buyers.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Lindsay Partin
programme.desc: When three-year-old Hannah Wesche dies of head trauma, Lindsay Partin, her babysitter, is indicted for her murder. She takes the stand to defend her innocence and explain statements she gave to police detectives.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Roy Oliver
programme.desc: Roy Oliver, a Dallas police officer, shot and killed Jordan Edwards, an unarmed 15-year-old. The officer takes the stand to try to explain his state of mind and convince a jury that he justifiably used lethal force.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Todd Kendhammer
programme.desc: What seemed like a freak traffic accident soon becomes a suspected mover cover-up. Todd Kendhammer takes the stand to convince a jury that he would never hurt his wife Barbara.

programme.title: Movie: Now You See Me
programme.desc: An FBI agent and an Interpol detective track a team of illusionists that pull off bank heists during their performances and reward their audiences with the money.

programme.title: Movie: Unstoppable
programme.desc: A conductor and a veteran engineer race against the clock to stop an unmanned freight train before it reaches a city and causes a catastrophe.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Guy travels to places where things are still done the old-fashioned way. In Oklahoma City, a steak house has been serving the same menu items for more than 80 years.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Loaded
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for the biggest and fullest loaded meals and flavours around.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: East Coast Eatin'
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri checks in on some favorite East Coast eats. His first stop is a neighborhood joint that's still dishin' out diner classics from a cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Dishes
programme.desc: Guy takes on unique eats. In Honolulu, a Jamaican joints serves up jerk chicken wings and goat curry. In Arlington, it's potato pancake stuffed with beef. And in Las Vegas, a taco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Southern and South of the Border

programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing some barbecue and Southern comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Shipped, Sweet & Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri makes Triple-D style takeout with DDD alums who join Guy and Hunter via video chat. On this menu, there's killer Cajun coming from Los Angeles, sweet and savory crepes out of Las Vegas and empanadas sent from Denver.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Everyday Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting the road and taking a detour to find some out-of-the-ordinary eats. In Chico, California, a Hawaiian-Asian fusion spot serving up righteous ramen and a fried chicken bao.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island Flavor

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Haunts
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's takin' a spin through the town favourites. In Chatham, N.J., the real deal Italian joint bakin' up some righteous fried chicken, arancini balls and the decadent sacred swine sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Surf and Turf

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Seafood

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Portable Food
programme.desc: It's food on the move with Ina Garten as she shares pro tips for perfect portable eats. She makes moist lemon poppy seed cake for an afternoon snack at work and tomato mozzarella pan bagnat.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Party Helpline
programme.desc: The Kitchen Helpline is answering summer party questions and sharing recipes like Geoffrey Zakarian's grilled seafood platter and Katie Lee's peach caprese with balsamic cherries.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Comfort Classics and Fruity Cocktails
programme.desc: Proving you can make any dish outside on a grill, Michael prepares a rich mac and cheese loaded with smoked ham with cream cheese, gouda and pecorino. He finishes off with a grilled apple crisp over their fire pit.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Clambake on the Grill
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a summertime seafood meal that's all about the prep and then letting the foil and grill do the work. He makes foil packets of Clams with Sausage and Peppers and, for dessert, Peaches with Mascarpone and Honey.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 3 Apps and a Cocktail
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has cocktail hour and a summer party on her mind. She puts her ranch kitchen spin on a BBQ shrimp cocktail, makes irresistible buffalo chicken meatball skewers, bakes bacon ranch cheesy bread and mixes up blueberry-basil limeade.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Ranch Cookout
programme.desc: Ree Drummond puts together a quick and easy ranch-style cookout. She makes super-fast Caribbean Burgers with Mango Slaw for a taste of the islands in Oklahoma, and her Sunshine Pasta Salad and Lemon Mustard Dressing is a colorful side dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Wedding on the Ranch
programme.desc: Join the guest list to the fabulous frontier wedding as Ree Drummond’s daughter Alex Drummond marries her college sweetheart Mauricio Scott.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Summer Vibes
programme.desc: Nothing screams summer party weekend like BBQ Shrimp, Michael Symon-style. Michael creates his delicious shrimp dish on the grill along with a side of creamed corn with lime and tangy tomatillo sauce.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Calexico Tailgate
programme.desc: When Guy Fieri can't make it to the stadium for a good tailgate party, he does the next best thing and invites his all-star chef buddies to cook and eat outside at his ranch.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Hometown Favorites

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Red, White and Bbq

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The View from the Top

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Off to the Races
programme.desc: Chef Josh Capon and sports reporter Carolyn Manno team up to make sure Bobby Flay doesn't try for a trick play. Haitian chef Jouvens Jean takes on Francophile and Seattle restaurateur Bruce Naftaly to beat Bobby at his own game.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: No Cake Walk
programme.desc: Three of Bobby Flay's friends unite to try and take him down. Sunny Anderson, Alex Guarnaschelli and Buddy Valastro do their best to take the cake.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Double Trouble

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Cold Water Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets off to Alaska to investigate the freshwater beast responsible for multiple fatal incidents and the disappearance of several anglers. In Canada, Jeremy is determined to find the shadowy predator lurking beneath the lake.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many rumoured to have been eaten alive. Jeremy retraces the doomed boat's last voyage and faces adversaries as he tries to uncover what was being the Amazon Apocalypse.

programme.title: River Monsters: Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: New Zealand's freshwaters have been a safe place for swimmers, yet as Jeremy finds out, its remote rivers and deep lakes provide refuge for an ancient and slippery predator that has stayed hidden for more than a century.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly
programme.desc: A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale.' Blacktip reef shark L2 is not eating normally and staff work to figure out why. See the first sea lion born at the aquarium.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Toddler Sea Lion Scarlett
programme.desc: A southern sea otter is rushed to the health center. The team travels to Key Largo to help coral restoration efforts. Young African penguins prepare for an upcoming event. Love is in the air for a trainer and his favorite sea lion pup, Scarlett.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ophelia the Octopus
programme.desc: Two rescued sea lions arrive at the aquarium, and trainers help prepare them for an upcoming eye surgery. The team travels to the Bahamas to research the effects of plastics in the ocean on sharks. The aquarium conducts a study to help wild beluga whales.

programme.title: The Zoo: Velcro the Incredible
programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: New Chick on the Block
programme.desc: A popular sea lion falls ill after ingesting a foreign object. The avian team devises a plan to increase the cock-of-the-rocks population. Endangered snakes are coupled for breeding, and Andean bear cubs meet their fans.

programme.title: The Zoo: Beloved Bugs
programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.title: The Zoo: Fawns Become Friends
programme.desc: Two sickly newborn fawns form an unbreakable bond while they are hand-reared by staff. Leopard Khazo gets a surprise that enhances her life, and tensions run high as the reptile staff attempts to collect blood from Cuban crocs.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Sparkle in the Sunshine State
programme.desc: After winning a million dollars, a couple seeks a home in Jupiter, FL, which is renowned for the lifestyle it offers to the rich and famous. Florida's booming population and low stock challenge David Bromstad to find a glamorous home at the right price.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Place on Pamlico Sound
programme.desc: After scratching her way to a million-dollar win, a woman and her husband upsize their retirement plans to include a place on the shores of Pamlico Sound in North Carolina.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Gone With the Win
programme.desc: A woman that won the lottery with 19 of her co-workers has been dreaming of a new life and home with her fiance. Now, they're ready to look for a grand Tennessean mansion.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Mass Cash Stash
programme.desc: David Bromstad helps a couple find a home with tons of square footage and a huge backyard for their dog after winning $4 million on a scratcher in Orange, Massachusetts.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Buy Now, Inherit Later
programme.desc: A construction worker that won $250,000 calls on David Bromstad to help him find a home close to his eight adult daughters. One daughter joins the house hunt and looks for a place that has projects to keep them busy and space for the grandkids to visit.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Million-Dollar Baby
programme.desc: Thanks to a million-dollar win on a scratch-off, a couple and their baby can finally move out of their one-bedroom apartment. David is happy to help this family find a bigger home near Binghamton, New York, even if he does struggle with the city's name.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: South Shore Score
programme.desc: David helps his 14th set of Massachusetts winners find a home on Boston's South Shore. They've been living in a tiny apartment with their giant fur baby, but they hope to find a property with a huge yard where they can start a family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Lucky in Las Vegas

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Six Million Reasons to Smile
programme.desc: The Florida lottery gave a couple of government employees a fabulous early retirement gift of six-million dollars! With their teens in tow, David shows the whole family how to revel in luxury as they embark on a spree full of sun, sand and lavish homes.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Luckiest Cape
programme.desc: A single mother and her 14-year-old son have been dreaming of moving out of their tiny one-bedroom sublet and into a bigger place of their own. Their dreams became a reality after a gigantic $4-million lottery win.

programme.desc: Adam visits the California State Fair for amazing fried food on a stick. Then it's on to some Capital-sized pancakes at Jim Denny's. Finally, Adam faces off against five pounds of chilli-smothered hot dogs in the Knucklehead Challenge at Parkers Hot Dogs.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines
programme.desc: Adam's sampling Midwestern comfort food at its finest-pressure roasted chicken and bacon wrapped tater tots.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Knoxville
programme.desc: Adam Richman is in Knoxville, Tennessee for some huge, hand-cut steaks, unique burgers and a five-pound barbecue burrito challenge at Sweet P's BBQ.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ann Arbor
programme.desc: Adam Richman heads to Ann Arbor, Michigan, home of the Michigan Wolverines. This town is all about football but has some great grub, like delicious stacked burgers and some of the best deli sandwiches in the state.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Memphis
programme.desc: Adam's ongoing quest to find America's best pig out spots brings him to Memphis, Tennessee, home to deep fried Southern cooking, mouth-watering pork barbecue and a seven and a half pound burger known as the Sasquatch.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels to Columbus, Ohio, to tailgate with Buckeye fans, and chow down at legendary burger joint, feast at a historic sausage house, and tackle the a 2 1/2 pound Dagwood challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin
programme.desc: Adam travels to Austin for Texas-sized donuts, authentic Hill Country barbecue, and a near-impossible breakfast taco challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Amarillo
programme.desc: Adam Richman takes on a spicy "burger from Hell," chicken fried steak, and a 72oz steak challenge in Amarillo, Texas -the meat capital of the world- in his search of America's best pig out spots.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago
programme.desc: Adam visits the Windy City to chow down on overstuffed sandwiches, Italian beef sandwiches, and of course Chi-town-style deep-dish pizza.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military, and in fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space, even on Mars itself.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting oceans.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs in the Past and Present

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52

programme.desc: A taboo romance between a mother and her daughter's ex-boyfriend becomes the focus of police when two dead bodies are discovered.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Mirinda Boob & Ron Heichel
programme.desc: A wife and mother seeks attention outside her marriage and triggers a deadly chain of events.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Kelly Ryan & Craig Titus
programme.desc: A bodybuilding husband and wife find themselves the targets of a murder investigation when a burnt body is found in the desert.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Alice and Gerald Uden
programme.desc: The unexplained disappearances of a young mother and her two sons in 1980 lead investigators on a three-decade quest for justice, exposing multiple murders and a homicidal love affair that left untold suffering and carnage in its wake.

programme.title: Charmed to Death: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Chilling true stories of romances that end in death and devastation.

programme.title: Snapped: Carol Carlson
programme.desc: When a Kapowsin, Washington mother is discovered murdered on her couch in a compromised position, investigators must piece together all the evidence to determine if this was a random crime of opportunity or a façade to humiliate the victim.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Queen of the County
programme.desc: The Harkey name was famous for pecan harvesting in Texas. So when the matriarch with a powerful grip on the family fortune went missing, investigators focused on the family tree. Turns out, the plot was more tangled than the branches of a pecan tree.

programme.title: Snapped: Minnie Salinas
programme.desc: Police race for answers after an adored school teacher is found dead in her San Antonio apartment. A string of lies and betrayal comes to light, but when the case goes cold, one detective refuses to give up.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Jacoby
programme.desc: After a soon-to-be-wed scrapyard owner is killed, Texas detectives must chase down every lead and conduct hundreds of interviews in order to find the truth hidden behind lies, betrayal and broken hearts.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Inside Job
programme.desc: In Hamburg, NY, employees at the local Toys 'R' Us are faced with the unthinkable when one of their own is savagely killed during an otherwise typical nightshift. Suddenly, every co-worker is a suspect, but is one masking as a murderer?

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Alice and Gerald Uden
programme.desc: The unexplained disappearances of a young mother and her two sons in 1980 lead investigators on a three-decade quest for justice, exposing multiple murders and a homicidal love affair that left untold suffering and carnage in its wake.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Kyle Navin and Jennifer Valiente
programme.desc: The sudden disappearance of a wealthy couple rattles their small town and launches an investigation that exposes a web of deception, greed, and a blood-soaked betrayal.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Carolyn King and Bradley Martin
programme.desc: A young couple becomes the target of a nation-wide manhunt after police connect the deadly lovers to two grisly murders in different states.

programme.title: Dateline: Twisted in Texas
programme.desc: When a woman breaks off a relationship with a boyfriend who abused and stalked, he goes on to do something worse. His accused accomplice is his new girlfriend.

programme.title: Dateline: Poison
programme.desc: When Larry McNabney disappeared from his Las Vegas law office and was later found dead, his wife, Elisa, quickly became a prime suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Miami Heat
programme.desc: A father and his infant son were shot on the streets of Miami. The son survived, the father didn’t and a widow was left wracked with grief. Then, there was another murder and police had to figure out whether it was a revenge killing or self-defense.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Out There
programme.desc: One murder in broad daylight. Then another brutal attack almost exactly a year later. Police discovered a chilling connection between the victims, and many feared they had a serial killer on their hands. It was a race to connect the dots.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets at Sunshine Motel
programme.desc: Vern Holbrook seemed to have it all: A thriving estate company and a beautiful family. When this beloved patriarch failed to show up at a meeting with his daughter-in-law, she was concerned Vern was not delayed, that it was something far worse.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Frank Rodriguez was a Navy vet who dedicated his life to helping needy children, not a guy with many enemies. Figuring out who would want him dead was a challenge. How he died was also a mystery investigators needed to solve to catch his killer.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Other Zodiac
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs. Police race against time before he can achieve twelve killings to complete the Zodiac.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Smell of Death
programme.desc: A rash of young men go missing around Chicago during the 1970's. When bodies start washing up in the river a pattern emerges. A small piece of evidence leads police to the house of a model citizen where his furnace puts the suspect in the hot seat.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Hunted to Death
programme.desc: Police have found a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness. After months of searching police zero in on a local family man who's been living a double life that no one suspected.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Collar and Leash Killer
programme.desc: A string of women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash. Detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Killer Athlete
programme.desc: The I-5 corridor in California is taken over by a brazen bandit who terrorizes the highway with a blitz of assaults and murders. The only clue to the identity of the killer is a specific athletic tape used to bind his victims.

programme.title: Movie: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three African-American women are hired by NASA to calculate launch and landings for the first astronaut to make a complete orbit around the Earth. Working in a segregated department, they fight racial barriers to make history in more than one way.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangers on a Train
programme.desc: Homer decides to recreate his first wedding anniversary when he learns the beloved train they rode is in dire need of a makeover. Meanwhile, Marge inadvertently starts up a conversation with a likeable man online.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerland
programme.desc: In a nod to the hit cable series 'Homeland,' Lisa suspects Homer may have been 'turned' when he returns a changed man from a nuclear power plant operating convention. So she enlists the services of the FBI.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Regrettings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Four Springfielders are prompted to try to right past regrets following the funeral of a beloved neighbour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: YOLO
programme.desc: Marge encourages Homer to embrace his 'You Only Live Once' spirit by inviting an old pen pal to stay with him and cross items off of his 'to-do' list from when he was a 10-year-old. Meanwhile, Lisa institutes a new honour code at Springfield Elementary.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Labor Pains
programme.desc: Homer remembers his Lamaze skills when he's forced to deliver a baby in an elevator. When the mother names the child Homer Jr., he quickly develops a deep emotional bond with the kid. Lisa is recruited by the cheerleaders of the local pro football team.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Kid Is All Right
programme.desc: Lisa finally makes a new best friend, Isabel Gutierrez, only to discover that she's a Republican and her opponent in the campaign for second grade class representative.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Yellow Subterfuge
programme.desc: Principal Skinner promises the students that the best-behaved among them can take a ride in a submarine. When Skinner gives all the kids a clean slate, Bart believes even his own past indiscretions will be forgotten.

programme.title: The Simpsons: White Christmas Blues
programme.desc: Springfield is inundated with holiday revellers after the nuclear power plant springs a radiation leak, causing snow to fall all over town. When the tourists drive up Christmas shopping prices, Marge opens up the Simpsons' house to boarders.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Steal This Episode
programme.desc: Homer becomes annoyed with movie theatres, so Bart teaches him how to download movies illegally. Homer is delighted with his discovery of free movies until he's caught for piracy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Specs and the City
programme.desc: Mr. Burns gives high-tech eyeglasses to all of his employees in order to spy on them. Homer loves the enhanced reality of his new gadget; that is, until Marge tries them on and he finds out she's seeing a marriage counsellor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Diggs
programme.desc: Bart is rescued from a confrontation with Springfield Elementary's bullies by Diggs, a recent transfer student and aspiring champion in the niche sport of falconry. But, Bart soon discovers that Diggs wants to do more than just wrangle falcons.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man Who Grew Too Much
programme.desc: On a research trip, Lisa is shocked to discover that Sideshow Bob is now the chief scientist at a massive chemical engineering company, but her fears are allayed as she becomes enamoured with his likeminded appreciation of high-culture.

programme.title: Family Guy: Absolutely Babulous
programme.desc: When Stewie receives a participation medal in his school's toddler games, he begins to question everything he has ever won. Meanwhile, Peter causes a fight between Lois' parents and must repair the damage he caused.

programme.title: Family Guy: Disney's the Reboot
programme.desc: In a special meta episode of 'Family Guy,' the network decides that it's time to explore some unique ways to reboot the series. When three versions of the reboots are shown to a focus group, the feedback takes some surprising turns.

programme.title: Archer: Crossing Over
programme.desc: Once again, Archer's sex life compromises his effectiveness as an agent. But this time it's more serious.

programme.title: Archer: Skin Game
programme.desc: Archer is faced with a dilemma when his murdered fiancée, Katya, miraculously reappears.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Alien Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, human-sized egg floating in Arctic waters, some experts wonder if it's evidence of alien life; using cutting-edge technology, investigators try to reveal the true origins of this unexplained discovery.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Strange Signals
programme.desc: Cameras capture unsettling events as a mysterious blue glow radiates above Madrid and strange nocturnal flashes fall from the skies of Washington; experts use advanced tech to investigate what may be other-worldly signals from beyond.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Neanderthal Bigfoot Attack
programme.desc: When a close encounter with an enraged ape-like creature is caught on camera, experts investigate if it's evidence of a once-extinct Neanderthal specimen engineered by a nearby experimental research facility.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Neanderthal Bigfoot Attack
programme.desc: When a close encounter with an enraged ape-like creature is caught on camera, experts investigate if it's evidence of a once-extinct Neanderthal specimen engineered by a nearby experimental research facility.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Buried Beneath Jerusalem
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Heist in the Holy Land
programme.desc: Ancient documents and legends suggest that the Ark of the Covenant may have been stolen by Roman legions and hidden in Rome. Now, a team of archaeologists explore mystery cults and ancient catacombs to uncover the truth behind this treasured artifact.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: The Doomsday Curse
programme.desc: Ancient scriptures describe the Ark of the Covenant as possessing an almighty force with the capacity to kill; now, an expert team of archaeologists trace the ark's destructive path in a quest to discover the truth behind its mythical power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: The Jeremiah Code
programme.desc: According to biblical scripture, the prophet Jeremiah hid the Ark of the Covenant at a remote location for safekeeping. Now, a team of archaeologists investigate sacred sites and ancient tombs to retrace the possible journey of this lost artifact.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Legend of the Knights Templar
programme.desc: The holy order of the Knights Templar are believed to have located and seized the Ark of the Covenant centuries ago.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: See No Evil: We Never Fight
programme.desc: A family's worst nightmare begins when 23-year-old Christina Morris goes missing while out with friends in Plano, Texas. Police franticly search to find her alive, but it's the discovery of surveillance camera footage that reveals the shocking truth.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Last Laugh
programme.desc: Dawn Sandoval is gone. What appears to be a missing person’s case, take a stunning turn when very different portraits of her are revealed. Now, detectives must weed through a series of tangled relationships to uncover where Dawn has been all along.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Blood on the Bed
programme.desc: When 27-year-old Byron Edwards is found brutally stabbed in his home, his family is absolutely devastated. But as detectives work to find the person responsible, they discover a single piece of evidence that changes the course of their investigation.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Do You Want to Smell Human Blood?
programme.desc: Shelby Weatherly is found brutally stabbed to death by the side of the highway, and investigators struggle to find a suspect. Forensic evidence and reports of a mysterious car lead to revealing images and evidence that point toward the vicious killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: So Hateful
programme.desc: When 46-year-old Anthony Edwards is found shot in the park, his family has no idea who would want to bring harm to a man that was loved by so many. Using modern technology and forensic testing, detectives are determined to bring his killer to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Frenzy
programme.desc: Billy Shuler is dead. Now, video and audio capture the detective’s desperate hunt for his killer. As the case slowly unravels, someone comes forward and identifies Billy's murderer. When the US Marshals get involved, the killer is brought to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Go in There
programme.desc: Beverly Puccio is brutally murdered and found at home by an oddly behaving ex-boyfriend. Detectives use security and traffic cam footage to piece together the last night of her life including an encounter with a mysterious stranger to find her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Albuquerque Ambush
programme.desc: Don Fluitt is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, security video captures the moments just before the evil deed and a surprising twist will bring this killer to their knees.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: The Last Shot
programme.desc: Single father of four Richard Mannion always follows his heart. But when the 42-year-old is found shot dead in his home, police suspect he may have been looking for love in all the wrong places. Somewhere in his tangled web of romance hides a killer.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Going Places
programme.desc: A 39-year old woman, Melissa Lewis, has just made partner at a prestigious law firm, but when she is found murdered in a particularly personal manner.

programme.title: Dateline: The Feud
programme.desc: Even in a peaceful place, like just south of Glacier National Park in Montana, tempers can flare and personalities will clash.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murdered in the Cold of Winter
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Stamping Ground, Kentucky, the dead body of a young woman is found late at night by her brother and father. When detectives learn the victim was pregnant, they consider it a motive for murder and begin a homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Stolen Memories
programme.desc: Leaving behind Scranton, Pennsylvania, a woman and her family head for the white sands of Florida to start a new life. When one of them disappears, their dream becomes a nightmare they must live over, and over again.

programme.title: Redrum: The Last Summer
programme.desc: Brittany Loritts spent the summer after graduating high school fantasizing about the freedom college would bring. But her dreams are brought to a tragic end when she is found murdered in her bedroom. It seems someone wasn't ready to see her go.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Only if There's Something in It for Me
programme.desc: While being questioned in the abduction of an Anchorage barista, a young local businessman starts negotiating with investigators to reveal details of a depraved secret life as one of America's most meticulous and psychopathic serial killers.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Somebody Knows Something
programme.desc: Families of a college student and a mother of five are left stunned as their loved ones disappear and complicated conspiracies arise.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: A young woman is swept off her feet by the man of her dreams but before they have a chance to meet, a tragic accident sends him to jail. Against the odds, they grow even closer. But when she disappears, her family begins to question his story.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Philly Fallout
programme.desc: The building of a backyard shed destroys a years long, close relationship between two neighbors and ignites a vicious conflict that sees property destroyed, pets killed, and finally two people shot to death in cold blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Evil Spirits
programme.desc: When one deals with the devil, somebody's gonna get burned.

programme.title: Serial Killer Saturday: Aileen Wuornos
programme.desc: America's first female serial killer wrote down her darkest secrets for her best friend while on Florida's death row. Now, for the first time, those secrets are revealed in detail as the written words of Aileen Wuornos tell us what really happened.

programme.title: Serial Killer Saturday: The Green River Killer
programme.desc: Victims of The Green River Killer are still being found today. Now, with access to hundreds of hours of unseen police footage, we will reveal the shocking truth behind one of America's most prolific serial killers.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Out of Debt
programme.desc: After suffering a serious injury, Jaime Jones helplessly watches his bills and late notices on mortgage payments pile up. With his family's welfare at stake, he dons a disguise and robs banks to pay off his debts. But his greed will be his downfall.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape with a Battleaxe
programme.desc: Russell Kerr is serving a 60 year sentence for a crime he says he didn't commit. He and a fellow inmate, Christopher Stout, mastermind an elaborate escape. After busting through the prison gates, they risk life and limb for their one shot of freedom.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a Firefighter
programme.desc: Posing as a firefighter, a writer kidnaps a co-worker and terrorizes her for 16 hours before leading detectives on a chase.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Remarried
programme.desc: After an argument one morning, Michael McGuffey shot his wife point blank in the head. With support from his mother, Michael flees Mexico where he remarries and has a child. The FBI is able to trace Michael by his bank records and bring him into custody.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Out of Debt
programme.desc: After suffering a serious injury, Jaime Jones helplessly watches his bills and late notices on mortgage payments pile up. With his family's welfare at stake, he dons a disguise and robs banks to pay off his debts. But his greed will be his downfall.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Civil War: Blood on the Battlefields: Tipping Point
programme.desc: In the spring of 1861, America's grand experiment in democracy is on the verge of collapse. The country is going to war and majestic landscapes become hell on earth.

programme.title: Civil War: Blood on the Battlefields: The Butcher's Bill
programme.desc: As summer of 1862 approaches, the American Civil War is in its second year. It has become a more brutal and bloody conflict than anyone ever believed possible. North and South march on, knowing the next battlefield is just beyond the horizon.

programme.title: Civil War: Blood on the Battlefields: A New Birth of Freedom
programme.desc: By January of 1863, the American Civil War has entered its third year. More than 200,000 soldiers have been killed or wounded and still there is no end in sight. With both committed to victory, the Civil War is about to enter its bloodiest days.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: American Nurse Heroes
programme.desc: Take an in-depth look at the lives and careers of nurse practitioners, clinicians, health experts and educators, and discover how they have worked to save the lives of our loved ones in the face of a global pandemic.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Roadside Stories
programme.desc: A whole other story is behind the roads and bridges that cross the United States. On this episode of America's Facts Vs. Fictions learn a woman was the driving force behind completing the Brooklyn Bridge and Route 66 wasn't built from scratch.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Learn that our Halloween's origins aren't all that ancient and that Edgar Allan Poe is not the madman that others have made him out to be.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: DuckTales: Daytrip of Doom!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks!
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terrafirmians!

programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System!
programme.desc: When Mark Beaks invents an uncrashable self-driving car, threatened Launchpad recruits Gyro's eager intern Fenton to help him defeat the mechanical menace.

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!

programme.desc: Scrooge reteams with his conniving ex-partner and old flame, Goldie O' Gilt, to find a long-lost golden lagoon, but Glomgold has other plans.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tri-Stone Area/ Doof Dynasty

programme.desc: The Parks Department joins forces with a local company to sell energy bars at the park in Pawnee, but Leslie tries to stop the deal when she discovers just how unhealthy the snacks are.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Galentine's Day
programme.desc: Leslie hears a story about her mom's old flame and tries to track him down for Valentine's Day. Andy and his band are nervous about playing a gig at the Senior Center.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Woman of the Year
programme.desc: Leslie is outraged when Ron wins the 'Woman of the Year' award for a project she started. Tom is desperate to find some money to invest in a local Pawnee club.

programme.title: The Office: Blood Drive
programme.desc: Michael meets a mysterious woman at a Valentine's blood drive. Dwight and Kevin pair up with single women at the office 'Lonely Hearts Party.' Meanwhile, Jim and Pam are banished from the office for being too publicly affectionate.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket
programme.desc: Michael causes a huge problem in the office when he comes up with the idea to put 'golden tickets' into the paper packages for clients to redeem. Andy, Jim and Pam give Kevin different advice on wooing a woman.

programme.title: The Office: New Boss

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks
programme.desc: Michael's relationship with the new vice president becomes increasingly tense after he finds excuses to goof off even more than usual. Meanwhile, Pam faces the challenge of a new copier and Kelly develops a crush.

programme.title: The Office: Dream Team
programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition

programme.title: The Office: Broke
programme.desc: Michael's new company struggles to make early morning deliveries while the office tries to get their expense reports in on time after Angela enforces Dunder Mifflin's policy.

programme.title: The Office: Casual Friday
programme.desc: Michael has to mediate a dispute within his new sales team. Meanwhile, trouble brews in the office when several employees take the term 'casual' Fridays too loosely.

programme.title: The Office: Cafe Disco
programme.desc: Michael gets into the café/ disco scene. Meanwhile, Pam and Jim decide to take a secret trip.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Movie: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: NASCAR driver Ricky Bobby's talent and devotion are put to the test when a French Formula One driver challenges him for the Championship.

programme.desc: A newly engaged woman begins to suspect her husband's ex isn't gone for good.

programme.title: Movie: Cradle Did Fall
programme.desc: Inspired by a shocking, true story, a woman poses as an infant photographer in order to befriend a young mother and steal her baby.

programme.title: Movie: Cleveland Abduction
programme.desc: The film explores the true story of Michelle Knight, a 21-year-old single mom who was abducted by Ariel Castro in Cleveland and held captive in his home for more than 11 years along with two teen girls.
