programme.title: Cellmates Secrets: Chris Watts
programme.desc: Author Cheryln Cadle divulges chilling never-before-heard details that Chris Watts personally told her about murdering his family.

programme.title: Movie: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
programme.desc: After tearfully pleaded to television cameras for the safe return of his missing pregnant wife, a man is found guilty of their murders.

programme.title: Movie: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: When their sons begin having play dates, moms Stephanie and Emily find themselves also becoming friends with each other, but when the glamorous Stephanie goes missing, vlogger Stephanie tries to uncover the truth behind her sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Movie: The Hand That Rocks the Cradle
programme.desc: A woman plots to take revenge against the woman she holds responsible for her husband's death and the loss of her baby. After gaining employment with the family as a nanny, she works to take over the affections of the father and daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Sand Trapped
programme.desc: Upon completing his 14-day Fan Challenge, Dan, a biologist from Hawaii, attempts 21 days in a completely foreign landscape, the blistering Chihuahua Desert. Paired with a leathersmith, he takes on rattlesnakes, stinging fire ants and bone-chilling nights.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rise Above
programme.desc: An openly gay horse trainer and an anxious wilderness instructor take on the daunting jungle of Amazonia. Constant rain and a lack of resources make one survivalist hit rock bottom quickly, while the other is forced to pick up the slack.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Honduran Hell
programme.desc: In the mountainous rainforest of Honduras, a survivalist with an unusual past is paired with a hard-headed police detective, but predatorial jaguars, swarms of fire ants and a debilitating injury threaten their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: What the Duck?
programme.desc: In Mexico's unforgiving, cenote-covered landscape, two fan survivalists are dropped on an island filled with venomous coral snakes, territorial jaguars, blood-sucking chiquistas and a duck named Henry that they desperately want to eat for dinner.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Mountain man Joe, and former cop Andrea take on Namibia. This vast land is home to dangerous predators, including the deadly hippopotamus. But it's her inner demons that threaten Andrea's survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bite Me
programme.desc: Surrounded by crocodiles, leopards and venomous snakes, survivalists band together against the South African bush. But scorpion and aggressive tick bites in the most vulnerable parts of the body put their challenge at risk.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Swamp Don't Care
programme.desc: All-star survivalists Jake Nodar and Melissa Miller take on a punishing Florida swamp teeming with poisonous snakes and aggressive alligators. When one of the survivalists becomes disoriented local authorities are called in to conduct an all-out search.

programme.desc: To cross the gator-filled swamp, Rylie, Matt and Ryan engineer an epic 50-foot bridge in a desperate attempt for resources. Harassed by a black bear, Jeff and Steven must abandon their camp. EJ stalks a gator who has been stealing his fish.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: A Feast of The Eyes
programme.desc: An eye-popping decision bordering on reckless puts a survivalist's challenge at risk. Two camps go head-to-head when one team sabotages the other's hunt. A tribe begins an epic project to take on the swamp, building a primitive canoe from a downed log.

programme.desc: Jenny is devastated when she hears shocking news about Sumit. Laura is torn between Liam and Aladin. Corey is conflicted about returning to Evelin in Ecuador. Paul's mother arrives in Brazil. Tiffany is worried about giving birth in South Africa.

programme.desc: Sumit reveals his truth. Deavan discovers more troubling information about Jihoon's past. Corey returns to Ecuador with less than a month on his visa to convince Evelin to wed. Liam gives Aladin an ultimatum.

programme.desc: Jerry moves his new young girlfriend, Kayee, into a house he shares with his ex-wife Jessica. Lisa still isn't over her divorce from her ex Jimmy, even though it was decades ago. Alex went from Caroline's gay best friend to her boyfriend.

programme.desc: Mom Karla and daughter Rykia bond by giving each other Brazilian waxes. Southern belles Lisa and Lauren plan a secret at-home insemination. Sunhe and Angelica prepare to announce big news to Jason's mom.

programme.desc: Karla worries that she and Rykia are drifting apart. Lauren comes clean to Laura Leigh about the secret she's been keeping. Amy gets emotional when she realizes she needs space from Carina. Meanwhile, Angelica's condition worsens.

programme.desc: Karla worries that she and Rykia are drifting apart. Lauren comes clean to Laura Leigh about the secret she's been keeping. Amy gets emotional when she realizes she needs space from Carina. Meanwhile, Angelica's condition worsens.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Entourage Sabotage
programme.desc: Sometimes, a bride's entourage is bossy instead of helpful. Tenisha wants lots of bling, but her bridesmaids insist on other styles. Elyse's mom demands she try on a pink ball gown. Adriana's family argues over the length of her hem.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Seal of Approval
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to look like a 'sex kitten' on her big day, but her mom wishes for something modest. Second-time bride Lisa's mother is very opinionated about her dress choices. Elizabeth fears her mom won't approve the $13K gown she bought without her.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Top My Dream Dress!
programme.desc: Three brides hope Kleinfeld can top the dream dresses they've already found. Lucille found a satin dress, but still wants more bling. Dana is head-over-heels for a tulle gown her mom hates. Joan loves a dress back home but wants one unique to Kleinfeld.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Quest for Perfection
programme.desc: Actress Laurel is on tour with the musical 'Wicked,' and she wants a dress that doesn't resemble her stage costumes. Picky bride Kea has already tried on more than 100 dresses! Mackenzie worries her beach dress will be too short to cover her bare feet.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father Knows Dress
programme.desc: Caitie and her wedding planner father do not see eye-to-eye on a gown. Danielle lost her mother to cancer, so Dad steps in to help her make the big decision. Chic Ciccarelli is back for her fitting, channelling her deceased father every step of the way.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dueling Visions
programme.desc: Kristin is torn between looking sexy or traditional. Alexa also wants a dress with sex appeal, but she needs to please her conservative dad. Diana can't decide between a flowy or structured gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Style Therapy
programme.desc: Edgy bride Callie is more concerned with pleasing her mom than sticking to her own style.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dazed and Gown-fused
programme.desc: Bride Nicole comes in with a very specific style of dress in mind, but discovers it may not suit her. Indecisive Katy has already tried on 50 gowns elsewhere and still doesn't know what she wants. Cy can't choose between two perfect dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: Former model Meghan flew from St. Louis to find the perfect dress for her wedding to MLB star Jim Edmonds. Picky fashion buyer Lauren is back for her second visit. GMA meteorologist Ginger Zee tries on her reconstructed Pnina gown for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: When in Doubt, Customize
programme.desc: Host Courtney Cason only wants a Mark Zunino gown, and she gets a huge surprise at Kleinfeld. Zabrina looks for an extravagant ball gown for her Near Year's Eve wedding, and Cheryl is nervous to try on her custom dress because she has never seen it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Surprise, Surprise!
programme.desc: Tumi lost 175 lbs. and has a special guest waiting for her: Jillian Michaels. Megan leaves the salon for a surprise proposal and a trip.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Persia has flown from L.A. in search of a $14K Pnina dress, but no one can locate it. Katrice's two brothers, NFL stars Thomas and Julius Jones, secretly plan to purchase her gown. Fitting bride Brittany is shocked by an unwanted addition to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Tight, Strapless and Sexy!
programme.desc: Whytnee wants a sexy dress to suit her vixen image, Carla wants to show more skin than her mother would like, and 52-years-young Dina is ready to try on her gown, saying it will fit right if it fits tight.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Challenge after Challenge
programme.desc: Rebekah is a survivor of the Boston Marathon bombings, and she has just one month to find a dress for her dream wedding. Tall bride Gianna needs a gown with extra length, but she has high expectations for the 'once-in-a-lifetime' dress she envisions.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Dress like None the Rest
programme.desc: Broadway star Sutton Foster hunts for a dress to top all the other dresses she's worn. Wedding dress model Lauren fears she has worn too many gowns to find one that feels special. Hope is renewing her vows and this time she wants to wear her dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Thorn in the Bride's Side
programme.desc: Miss USA Erin Brady is ready to find her dream dress, but she must also please her mother-in-law.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sample Sale Madness!

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Falling Apart
programme.desc: Jenny and Sumit face each for the first time since she found out he's married. The issues between Laura, her son, and Aladin come to a head. Paul's Mom gives him a wake-up call. Tiffany makes a difficult decision for her family.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Never Let Me Go
programme.desc: A distraught Jenny no longer feels at home in India. Deavan struggles during her traditional Korean wedding ceremony. Evelin must decide if she wants to marry Corey. Tiffany worries about Ronald's recovery when she and Daniel leave South Africa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Home Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Brittany breaks the news to her father she's moving to Jordan. Jenny tells her daughter she's returning to India for the third time. Kenny sells his house to be with his love in Mexico. Ariela's move to Ethiopia is complicated in more ways than one.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bits and Pizzas
programme.desc: Rene sniffs out a great locker, Kenny fires up his profits and Brandi can't see the potential in the units.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mirro, Mirro, on the Floor
programme.desc: Dan and Laura hope for better units and better buyers in Santa Ana, while Rene tries to capitalize on warehouse sales. Jarrod finally buys the locker he wants and treats himself to a spa day.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bunny Owns This Town
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi are determined not to let Dave distract them from a good score, while Darrell wants to find out more about the elusive Mogul. Dave shows up with even more bluster, and Ivy uncovers a treasure that promises adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mayor of Margarita-ville
programme.desc: Rene bids heavy on a huge locker in search of quality merchandise, while Mary targets the lower end hoping for a longshot score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock the Vote!
programme.desc: Ivy comes across a cross-dressing locker while Jarrod and Brandi have good history in the area and hope for another score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Packed, Stacked and All Trash?
programme.desc: Auctions in Costa Mesa bring out the best and worst of the buyers as everyone tries to score a great buy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A San Marcos Mitzvah
programme.desc: An auction in San Marcos brings Darrell and Brandon to their home turf and Mary finds a way to deal with inflated prices.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Zen Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: Rene is being groomed to take over the competition, while Ivy learns a lesson that changes his tune about locker buying.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Mom Factor
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi are all about having fun as they try to dunk the competition. Darrell and Brandon hope to be on par with a victory, while Casey tries her hand at bidding. Ivy transforms his store into an auction house.

programme.title: Storage Wars: LBC U LTR
programme.desc: Ivy is racing against time to score a locker and get home; otherwise, he'll be in the doghouse. Rene spends the most money of anyone, but it's Darrell and Brandon who paint their way to success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Time to Kiln
programme.desc: The buyers head out to rainy San Jacinto, California, where Darrell discovers something that is music to his ears. Brandi and Jarrod find they need to team up with Barry if they want to make any money. Nabila tries to expand her territory.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hang 'Em High Desert
programme.desc: The buyers return to the high desert, where one discovers an antique toy.

programme.title: Biography: Jeff Dunham: Talking Heads
programme.desc: Jeff Dunham made ventriloquism hip again and entertained millions of people across the globe through his record setting comedy specials and mega-popular live performances. His drive, perseverance and competitive spirit kept him at the top of his game.

programme.title: Biography: Chris Farley: Anything for a Laugh
programme.desc: In his all-too-brief career, Chris Farley connected viscerally with audiences, creating hilarious characters that have stood the test of time. Behind his over-the-top stage presence were insecurities that were deeply tied to his addictive personality.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Space Oddity
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr offer evocative responses when taste testing new food. Plus, tonight's loser gets sent to a place far, far away.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: OK Zoomer
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe help job seekers land their next big gig and pitch their memoirs to a focus group. The losing joker will deliver news heard around the world.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Your Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Your Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Learn why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Ron Funches
programme.desc: Ron Funches has a new healthy lifestyle, but he's willing to make an exception for Wendy's spicy chicken sandwich. The three chefs try to replicate the sandwich to his liking.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Fortune Feimster
programme.desc: The chefs replicate Orange Chicken from Panda Express for Fortune Feimster.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Amanda Seales
programme.desc: The three chefs aim to recreate Taco Bell's Cheesy Gordita Crunch for Amanda Seales.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale
programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe serve up some mischief at White Castle, take on tourists in Times Square and check out customers in a warehouse store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: The guys get liberal with lotion down at the shore, shop from other people's carts in a supermarket and try to scam their way to a free dish of yogurt.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Boardwalk of Shame
programme.desc: The guys approach strangers with humiliating one liners on the streets of New York, play a unique word game in a grocery store, and try to get shoppers to hop in a trunk at a car dealership.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: The guys tackle speed dating with the world's worst pickup lines, read phoney fortunes on the boardwalk, and get too personal with shoppers in the hygiene aisle of a pharmacy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Stoop Sessions
programme.desc: The guys bring you their favourite moments from season one.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Stoop Sessions
programme.desc: The guys bring you more of their favourite hilarity from season one.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: The guys mouth off to patients in a dentist's office, toss popcorn at movie goers in a theatre, and take photos for their outrageous blogs in a public park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Art Attack
programme.desc: The guys get touchy feely in a comic book store and become manicurists.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Strip High Five
programme.desc: The guys say all the wrong things when conducting sensitivity training, have unexpected celebrity sightings on the street, and are forced into being unreceptive receptionists in a busy office.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: The guys share shameful secrets in the park, don headsets at a fast food drive-through, and try to convince unsuspecting strangers to dance with them.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Look Out Below
programme.desc: The Jokers lack hospitality as bumbling bellhops, pitch bizarre inventions to a confused focus group and serve lunch with a side of awkward when they man hot dog stands. Then, the guys reach for the sky to surprise tonight’s big loser.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q strike the wrong chord as music instructors and try to save face in a humiliating focus group face-off. Plus, tonight’s big loser lacks the magic touch in a show-stopping punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Field of Screams
programme.desc: The guys must identify the joker behind the humiliating commands in a voice-disguising challenge. Then, they call it quits with a cringe-worthy public announcement, and act as dinosaur experts with preposterous prehistoric lessons.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bonus Footage
programme.desc: The Impractical Jokers, Sal, Joe, Murr and Q meet after the show to talk about their favorite moments during the show not to mention the most uncomfortable, most embarrassing, most humiliating and most outrageous.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Nationals Disaster
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q fumble through the aisles of a grocery store and re-gift the kooky contents of a mystery bag. Then, the guys must seek out the chosen one, in an embarrassing needle-in-a-haystack challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toasted
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q get in a pickle serving up humiliating tasks as deli waiters, and later, they step behind the counter asking customers to settle a series of silly debates. Plus, tonight's big loser gets burned during an embarrassing toast.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Below the Belt
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put their sword wielding skills to the test while teaching fencing, and one joker is especially 'en garde' when he faces an Olympian. Plus, the guys trim away their dignity while posing as fabulous hairstylists at a salon.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Uncool and the Gang
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q host a team building seminar that's definitely not safe for work, and then channel their inner Picassos by posing as caricature artists on the boardwalk.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Elevating the Game
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q hop behind the register at a burger joint and then head to a department store where they have only themselves to blame. And tonight's big loser gets into a rigged elevator only to find his own worst nightmare.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Blunder Years
programme.desc: The guys try to justify getting humiliated at a convenience store, they give conflicting info about their event planning companies at a wedding expo and the loser awkwardly meets his celebrity childhood crush: Danica McKellar.

programme.desc: Two rival cheerleading squads literally turn cartwheels and more to make it to the top.

programme.desc: A designer's plans to remarry are threatened when her first husband refuses to divorce her.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You're Masa-ing with Me!

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavortown Medley
programme.desc: A Memphis bar-turned-bistro offers low brow favourites; a food truck in Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multicultural Cooking
programme.desc: Guy digs into traditions from many cultures, including tortillas, tacos, Jewish deli food, and Puerto-Rican specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Summer Spectacular
programme.desc: Fire up the grills and get the party started, Guy Fieri's bringin' the heat! In this one-hour special, it's all about summer.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Full of Surprises
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into some surprising ingredients. In Santa Fe, N.M., a culinary pub serving up lights-out lamb neck and frying up tamales. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky tapas joint dishin' out duck tongue tacos and braised pork jowl.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a tasty tour of New Orleans, Louisiana. He rolls into a legit butcher shop with a funky take on the Big Easy's comfort food flavors.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Meat and a Little Sweet
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into both meat and sweet, starting in Sioux Falls, SD, where a market-butcher eatery is serving a culinary extravaganza. Then, in Fargo, ND, a bakery cafe is scratch-making sticky pecan rolls and a savory French pastry dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fillin' Up in Florence
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's hitting up totally traditional Italian spots in Florence, Italy. First, the 50-year-old landmark serving up their legendary spaghetti specialty and some crazy good chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pork, Pasta and Barbecue
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checking out some tried and true local faves. In Kansas City, Mo., the neighbourhood favourite killin' it with their scratch-made standouts like pork hash with black beans.

programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into some dishes like mama made, if she had a wild imagination.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Par-T-Que
programme.desc: Trisha whips up some Potato Salad, grill up her cousin Fred's Barbecue Pork Ribs, mix together a Cherry Moscow Mule.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Hawaiian Cookout
programme.desc: Trisha's friends and glam-girls are in town, so she decides to have a little Hawaiian-themed cookout. They'll cook some bodacious dishes inspired by their trips to Hawaii like Rum-Glazed Shrimp Skewers with Mint Chimichurri, Crunchy Slaw and more.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Sicilian Splash Party
programme.desc: Valerie went on the trip of a lifetime to Italy last summer, but this year, she's bringing Italy to her own backyard! She's hosting an elegant poolside party inspired by her adventures in Sicily to kick off the summer.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Stress-Free Summer Fiesta!
programme.desc: Valerie reprises an all-girls meet-and-greet tradition to introducer her friends to some of her other gal pals.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Outdoor Cookout, Indoor Cooking
programme.desc: Ree and her best friend are throwing a poolside girls' get-together. Hyacinth's hosting and Ree's taking on all the cookout favorites, but making them inside. There's sticky oven roasted barbecue chicken thighs and grilled vegetables with yogurt dressing.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Graduation Party
programme.desc: Ree and her friend are throwing a graduation party for their daughters and it's going to be a blast. There's a steak and shrimp taco bar with great sides and toppings, including Tex-Mex black beans, queso blanco, and peach salsa.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Summertime
programme.desc: Ree makes big bad beef skewers with green and blue cheese mayo, and shrimp and pineapple flatbreads with avocado cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: California Cooking
programme.desc: The sun is shining, and Ree Drummond is doing some California-style cooking. She makes wine-roasted chicken with pistachio pesto pasta, vibrant cauliflower tacos with avocado crema and divine roasted grape and ricotta toasts.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Ladies' Painting Party
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a slew of colorful dishes for a painting party. The menu includes her pork meatball banh mi sandwiches, crispy rice salad with kale and succulent ham summer rolls. For dessert, there's a terrazzo jelly cake to draw then devour.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Easy Breezy Brunch
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is hosting a beach-themed brunch as the official summer party, and her menu includes lemon ricotta waffles with lemony mascarpone cream and berries, smoked white fish salad with bagel chips and boozy pink lemonade.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Mexican Fiesta
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her friends to a fun afternoon Mexican fiesta. She puts her spin on Mexican classics with recipes that include avocado salad, red and green charred salsa, cheater churros and steak fajitas.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: A Taste of Summer
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood enjoys her annual escape to the South Beach Wine and Food Festival in Florida, where she hosts events. To share this taste of summer, Trisha invites friends over for a South Beach-inspired meal.

programme.title: The Kitchen: No Sweat Summer Party

programme.desc: After historical wildfires rip through Australia, the Irwins race to rescue as many animals as possible. Robert and Terri jump in to help the severely injured koala population, while Bindi and the wildlife hospital rescue hundreds of baby flying foxes.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Big Day for Baby Rhino
programme.desc: Terri helps prepare the zoo's new baby rhino to receive a lifesaving vaccine. Robert is on a rescue mission to save two black swans in very bad shape. Bindi tries to determine if a cranky wombat named Poa might be pregnant.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Pawing Terri's Heart
programme.desc: Terri attends Charlie the tiger's exam to determine if his tumours were successfully treated. Bindi and the Small Mammal Team help develop a vaccine for Eden the Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Tigers of Shark Bay
programme.desc: Steve takes us on an adventure where he comes face-to-face with the world's most notorious sharks. He learns to trap an eleven-foot tiger shark in a plastic bag and hand-feeds deadly bull sharks known for fatal attacks.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Island of Snakes
programme.desc: Steve travels to Sri Lanka to investigate its high number of snakebite fatalities. He joins rice farmers, tea pickers and buffalo herders to study the most venomous species and encounters a man-eating Mugger crocodile.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Invisible Evidence
programme.desc: Officer Egan investigates the mysterious death of a deer. Officer Courtney and Lt. Cheney help a seal stuck in a tidal creek. Officer Bronson catches a young fisherman in a lie. And Officers lead the search for a woman with a head injury.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Turkey Trouble
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau, K9 Ruby and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunter suspected of shooting a turkey from the road. Officer McKee searches for a baby owl that fell from its nest. And Officer Hannett rushes to lead a carryout when a hiker is injured.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Coastal Criminals
programme.desc: Officer James Benvenuti chases down two lobster poachers in Rye. In a puzzling case, Officer Graham Courtney investigates a man on the beach found covered in blood. And Sergeant Adam Cheney attempts to apprehend trespassers on the railroad tracks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under the Radar
programme.desc: Officer Canfield breaks up a 45-year-old illegal fishing tournament. Officer MacFadzen rescues an injured hawk. Officer Hannett confronts two kids riding OHRVs on the road. On Mt. Chocorua, officers rescue a woman with a fractured ankle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: A Test of Strength
programme.desc: Officer Demler helps a hiker with a severe shoulder injury. Officer Fluette and K-9 Moxie take their certification test. Officer Holmes and trainee Frye look for evidence of an illegal deer kill. Officer MacFadzen bonds with his son on a hunting trip.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: Bill and Eric hit the jackpot on the St. Patrick's Day lottery and couldn't believe their good luck. Now, the happy couple and their twins need help finding a larger family home on Chicago's classy North Shore.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: On the Throne
programme.desc: Billy won a million dollars on a scratch-off and changed his family's life, no longer living paycheck to paycheck. Now, they need help to find a forever home in Knoxville, TN, that fits their $180,000 budget.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Waterfront Windfall
programme.desc: A couple was approaching a chilly retirement when they won $1 million on a Canadian lottery. Now they're ready to pack their bags and move across the country to Nova Scotia, where David will show them gorgeous lake and oceanfront properties.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Newlywed Millionaires
programme.desc: After these newlyweds bought a lotto ticket at a gas station, they filled up both their gas tank and their bank account. They are on the hunt for their dream home in Columbus, Ohio, where they can start a family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Six Million Reasons to Smile
programme.desc: The Florida lottery gave a couple of government employees a fabulous early retirement gift of six-million dollars! With their teens in tow, David shows the whole family how to revel in luxury as they embark on a spree full of sun, sand and lavish homes.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Bangor or Bust
programme.desc: Nick won $100,000 from a scratch off and now he and his wife Robyn want to buy their forever home in Bangor, Pennsylvania. David is challenged to find them a single-family home on a very small budget, and they want a three-car garage as well.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Mountain High Dreams
programme.desc: A Florida couple receives an inheritance from a long-lost relative that leaves them $900,000 richer. They struggle to agree on a budget for a mountain vacation home in Blue Ridge, GA, so David Bromstad steps in to help them find something they both love.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Slice of New Jersey Paradise
programme.desc: A former police officer couple manifested a better life for themselves and their five kids when they won the lottery in Bergen County, NJ. They call on David Bromstad to find a property that fits their large family and meets their sky-high expectations.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Reinvention in Las Vegas
programme.desc: After winning big on a scratcher, a California single mom is ready to leave her mobile home, job and old life behind for a new start in Las Vegas.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Payday in V-A
programme.desc: An attorney and single father of a three-year-old son scored $1 million on the mega millions. Now he's ready to move out of his rental and find the perfect father-son forever home in beautiful Richmond, Virginia.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: California Chick House
programme.desc: A young-at-heart grandmother wants to buy the perfect "chick house" after a $785,000 PowerBall win. David Bromstad helps her find an adorable home big enough to entertain her huge family but small enough to maintain by herself.

programme.desc: Emily and Ryan moved from out of state and were eager to purchase a home in an established neighborhood with a lot of young couples. After having two kids, however, Emily thinks the house is dated and wants more room for out-of-town guests.

programme.desc: Load up on finger lickin', crunchy, deep fried deliciousness. From a gut-busting double bacon corn dog in Iowa, to a lip smackin' fried hamburger in California, to a deep fried classic New York pizza, it's a deep fried paradise.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Hawaiian UFOs and More
programme.desc: Religious occurrences from around the world that may be proof of miracles. A man in Hawaii trespasses on government property and witnesses UFOs. Ghost hunters in Dover, England contact the spirit of a young boy in a haunted cave.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: New York UFO and More
programme.desc: A military veteran spies an otherworldly aircraft flying in the skies above New York. Screaming ghosts haunt the halls of an abandoned home in Belgium. A New Jersey couple discovers their dog has a paranormal playmate.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: A UFO Spotted Over the Pentagon and More
programme.desc: A pyramid-shaped UFO is spotted over the Pentagon, a father and his children are spooked by a ghost on a playground in Rhode Island and a security camera captures strange creatures stalking a California neighborhood.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Las Vegas UFOs and More
programme.desc: We begin in Knoxville, Tennessee where a team of ghost hunters try to contact the spirit of a recent murder victim. Then, in Ochopee, Florida a man captures rare footage of an elusive Bigfoot-like cryptid known for its pungent smell.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Stonehenge UFOs and More
programme.desc: In Wiltshire, England, mysterious lights shine in the sky near the legendary Stonehenge. A woman in Mount Gilead, North Carolina witnesses possible proof of an animal's soul. A farmer in Ocala, Florida finds remains.

programme.title: Movie: American Wedding
programme.desc: Jim's grandmother wants to see him walk down the aisle and as her health is deteriorating the gang scrambles to get to town for Jim and Michelle's wedding.

programme.title: Movie: American Pie
programme.desc: A group of high-school seniors enter a pact to lose their virginity before graduation.

programme.title: Movie: American Pie 2
programme.desc: After a year of college, Jim, Stifler, Kevin, Oz and Finch reunite for a summer of fun.

programme.title: Movie: American Wedding
programme.desc: Jim's grandmother wants to see him walk down the aisle and as her health is deteriorating the gang scrambles to get to town for Jim and Michelle's wedding.

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty
programme.desc: Bruce, a dissatisfied reporter, finds himself endowed with God's powers. At first he is delighted with all of the things he can do, but he quickly learns how difficult it can be to run the world.

programme.title: Movie: American Pie Presents: The Book of Love
programme.desc: Three virgins discover the Bible hidden in the school library, which leads them on a hilarious journey to lose their virginity.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live: Below Deck Sailing Yacht Reunion Part Two
programme.desc: Andy welcomes the Parsifal III crews for Below Deck Sailing Yacht Reunion Part Two. Gary explains his feelings for Alli, Sydney tells Alli why she hasn’t reached out to apologize and Dani makes a stunning reveal.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Captain Sandy's Yachtrageous Moments 2021
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and her crew share the best and worst moments from four seasons sailing the Mediterranean. Featuring the most Yachtrageous memories of the unforgettable crews and over the top guests that have come aboard.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Knot Today, Anchors
programme.desc: With Anastasia filling the role as temp chef and lead deckhand Travis helping as her sous chef, the exhausted crew continues to work a person down in each department. Joao acts quickly in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: All Hail the Queen
programme.desc: Motor yacht Sirocco braces for its most exclusive charter guest yet: The Queen of Versailles. João faces his old demons after a drunken night out as well as an increasingly defiant deck crew. A new third stew joins the boat who has Colin swooning.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: What Eze the Problem?
programme.desc: Hannah and Joao have a miscommunication over a guest excursion. In the galley, Anastasia is forced to prepare foods that go against her vegan lifestyle to please the charter guest, the 'Queen of Versailles.' June continues to struggle to impress Hannah.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Whole Different Ball Game
programme.desc: Baseball legend Johnny Damon comes on board with a group of his rowdiest friends making the crew work double-time. June struggles to keep her radio on, which leaves Hannah frustrated. Jack and Travis get in hot water when they fail to respond to an alarm.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Docked and Loaded
programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Monte Car-loco
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a day off at an exclusive resort in Monte Carlo, but some of them are faced with more than they bargained for. Joao and Hannah have a heart to heart, while June tries to open herself up to Hannah with not so favourable results.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time
programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too
programme.desc: Ben's first dinner doesn’t wow the guests as much as he had hoped leaving him questioning if he still has his sea legs. Anastasia has a hard time adjusting back to her old third stew role.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!
programme.desc: Ben is determined to regain his sea legs, but Sirocco's faulty galley has other plans. Travis' latest drunken night has Sandy at the end of her rope. Jack ups his romance game by writing poetry for Aesha.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom

programme.title: Counting Cars: Searching for Soul
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned by Barry White's estate to find and restore the legendary singer's Stutz IV Porte. Meanwhile, an old pullover visits the shop with a custom job that could teach The Count a lesson.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Talkin' to Me?
programme.desc: A Hollywood icon confronts Horny Mike and Roli in the shop parking lot. Danny tries to diffuse the situation before it gets explosive.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Car Hoarder
programme.desc: Danny can't stop buying cars and ends up in an extremely heated roadside bidding war.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Road Runner Redemption
programme.desc: A returning customer needs Danny's help restoring a 1971 Road Runner to give as a commemorative gift to his wife and step-daughter, but the years have not been kind to the ride.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Blinged Out Blazer
programme.desc: Danny's got himself a new ride, a classic two-wheel drive Chevy Blazer that he wants to trick out and flip for a big profit. Painter Ryan wants to try out a new twist on a retro flame design, but Danny is worried that it will look too 'Miami Vice.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: Lego My Caddy
programme.desc: Danny has big plans for a big client. Ryan discovers that smaller jobs aren't always easier, as he attempts to put a Counts Kustoms paint job on a high-tech Lego car.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Crazy Cool Cadillac
programme.desc: Ryan reluctantly goes down the Caddy customization wormhole on a personal project, and everyone at the shop is happy to watch him go, just to see how great it turns out.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Amazing Z
programme.desc: It seems every time Danny finds a project for the shop, he winds up keeping it. Now Ryan and Kevin are determined to find a car Danny will actually fix up, and flip.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Never Forget Your First Z28, Part One
programme.desc: A client asks Danny to find and build a 1979 Camaro Z28 to commemorate the first car he ever owned. After finding one online, the project turns into a nightmare when the car is in worse condition than they thought.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Never Forget Your First Z28, Part Two
programme.desc: Danny's battle with nightmare Z28 continues as he puts it through endless fabrication to bring it back to life. When the client comes to pick it up, Danny will finally learn if it was worth all the trouble.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Burt Reynolds' Rides
programme.desc: Vegas Golden Knights goalie Marc-André Fleury comes to Count's Kustoms looking for an all-American muscle car fit for a three-time Stanley Cup champion. Plus, Danny agrees to prep several of Burt Reynold's personal rides for auction.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Danny's Detroit Special
programme.desc: Danny restores a 1069 Shelby GT500 from a rust bucket into a classic. The team heads to the Detroit Autorama to check out the Ridler Award competition where expensive cars are the norm. Then, Danny sells two meaningful cars from his personal collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Killer Kellison
programme.desc: Danny and the guys take on an American street machine with the hopes of bringing it to the SEMA Convention. Plus, Shannon tries to tame a 500 horsepower Boss Hoss.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Magic Bus
programme.desc: Danny and the guys get to work transforming a 1960 Volkswagen Bus into a high end luxury beach cruise, but a hiccup may derail the project. Meanwhile, Ryan and Ghetto Bob give a very rare 1963 split window Corvette a wicked facelift.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: American Cheese
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, James Kraft and his new cheese innovation challenges thousands of years of tradition. Around the same time, the Pabst brothers introduce a shelf-stable cheese of their own.

programme.title: Movie: North by Northwest
programme.desc: An advertising executive is mistaken for a government agent. The enemy spies pursue him all across North America. Also, the police officers suspect him of murder.

programme.title: Movie: Vertigo
programme.desc: A web of obsession and deceit unfolds when Scottie Ferguson, a retired detective, falls in love with Madeleine, the wife of an old college friend. She has hired him to follow her, resulting in a tragic death because of his crippling fear of heights.

programme.title: Movie: The Birds
programme.desc: In a California coastal town, flocks of birds attack humans for no reason.

programme.title: Movie: Rear Window
programme.desc: A photographer who spies on his courtyard neighbours discovers a possible murder.

programme.title: Movie: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: A teen is thrilled when her favourite uncle visits, but she begins to suspect he's up to no good when she finds a damning newspaper article.

programme.title: Movie: Family Plot
programme.desc: A fake psychic and her taxi driver boyfriend are hired to find a lost heir to a fortune.

programme.title: Movie: Suspicion

programme.title: Movie: Shadow of a Doubt

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Out There
programme.desc: One murder in broad daylight. Then another brutal attack almost exactly a year later. Police discovered a chilling connection between the victims, and many feared they had a serial killer on their hands. It was a race to connect the dots.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets at Sunshine Motel

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Vanished with the Tides

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Unholy Secrets

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Mother's Day Murder

programme.title: Dateline: Written in Blood

programme.title: Dateline: A Dangerous Man

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Village of the Damned
programme.desc: Satellite images capture a cluster of bizarre man-made shapes carved deep into the fields of Yorkshire, England. Experts investigate and uncover the ghostly outline of an ancient settlement that came to a mysteriously sudden and catastrophic demise.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Occult Temple
programme.desc: Satellites capture a temple-like, Nazi structure hidden deep in the forests of Poland, leading an expert to investigate and uncover a tale of terrifying rituals, black magic and the rise of the most feared division of Hitler's war machine.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters of Diamond Desert
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past. When a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: How It's Made: Hockey Gloves, Snack Cakes, Remoulded Tires, Wastewater Treatment Plants

programme.title: Serial Killer Saturday: The Green River Killer
programme.desc: Victims of The Green River Killer are still being found today. Now, with access to hundreds of hours of unseen police footage, we will reveal the shocking truth behind one of America's most prolific serial killers.

programme.title: Serial Killer Saturday: The Grim Sleeper Part 1
programme.desc: In 2001, LAPD's cold case unit reopened the files on a series of unsolved murders from the 1980s. DNA evidence led them to one of the most ruthless serial killers - The Grim Sleeper, who preyed on the women of South Central for decades.

programme.title: Serial Killer Saturday: The Grim Sleeper Part 2
programme.desc: In 2001, LAPD's cold case unit reopened the files on a series of unsolved murders from the 1980s. DNA evidence led them to one of the most ruthless serial killers - The Grim Sleeper, who preyed on the women of South Central for decades.

programme.title: Serial Killer Saturday: Jeffrey Dahmer
programme.desc: With access to hundreds of pages of police and FBI interview transcripts and personal testimony from family, friends, and survivors, the haunting story of how Jeffrey Dahmer went from shy adolescent to a notorious serial killer and cannibal is revealed.

programme.desc: In 2001, LAPD's cold case unit reopened the files on a series of unsolved murders from the 1980s. DNA evidence led them to one of the most ruthless serial killers - The Grim Sleeper, who preyed on the women of South Central for decades.

programme.title: Serial Killer Saturday: The Grim Sleeper Part 2
programme.desc: In 2001, LAPD's cold case unit reopened the files on a series of unsolved murders from the 1980s. DNA evidence led them to one of the most ruthless serial killers - The Grim Sleeper, who preyed on the women of South Central for decades.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 1: Missing
programme.desc: In October 1989, 10 year-old-Amy Mihaljevic is lured to a suburban Ohio shopping mall by an unknown man and is never seen again. A 30 year mystery and nationwide manhunt ensues, thousands of leads, hundreds of suspects, one killer still at large.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains at large. A cavalcade of suspects emerges, each more compelling than the last. Investigators explore each one. Then, 106 days after Amy was taken, a gruesome discovery some 50 miles away from her Bay Village home: a body.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 3: New Evidence
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains on the loose and the case goes nationwide. Margaret appears on Oprah, anniversaries come and go, and then, finally, a confession. A man stands up in church in a neighboring town and declares: 'I killed Amy Mihaljevic.'

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Robin Tattoo
programme.desc: A dismembered torso turns up in a Florida forest, and the discovery launches detectives across the US to search for answers. With only a tattoo found on the victim, investigators must solve this horrific mystery before the killer is gone for good.

programme.title: Body Cam: Taken
programme.desc: In Colorado, an unpredictable armed ex-convict takes his family hostage and threatens to kill them and himself. In Florida, a gas station robbery leads to a life-threatening attack on a police officer and a night-time manhunt in the woods.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Bathtub
programme.desc: In 2000, a South Barrington, Illinois, rookie cop responds to the scene of what many believe to be an accidental drowning. The officer feels something about it doesn't sit quite right - and it's a hunch that, ten years later, he still hasn't forgotten.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Shelia Dates and her daughter Regina are more than blood relatives: they're best friends and roommates too. But one morning, their lives are irrevocably changed the moment two unexpected guests appear at their doorstep.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Driven To Murder
programme.desc: After locals smell what can only be the scent of charred meat, police find burned remains in an abandoned mining pit in the small town of Hibbing, Minnesota. Before they can investigate who committed the crime, first they must identity the body.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: Documenting the life of the money-loving mafia man Joe Colombo, who campaigned against harassment of Italian-Americans in the 1970s.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: John Gotti
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname `Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Lucky Luciano
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the US government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Killer Magic
programme.desc: It is the great untold story of World War Two. The role the Occult played in shaping and determining the outcome of the fight. Nazi Killer Magic reveals how esotericism and mysticism influenced Hitler's wartime commanders.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The incredible story of how Nazi scientists and UFOs combined to create technology that changed the world.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Northeast Texas Turnaround
programme.desc: A Minnesota couple searches for a vacation home in Texas that reminds them of their home state. Their agent helps them find a lakefront property in northeast Texas that may be their dream home, but its current state requires quite a bit of TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: From LA to Lake Tuscaloosa
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy LA lives with a quiet vacation home along Lake Tuscaloosa. They find a property with great potential and are ready to take on the renovations, but it may prove to be more work than expected.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lone Star State Update
programme.desc: After spending years living all over the world, Teresa and Jeremy find the perfect vacation home for their family in their home state of Texas. They're ready to put down roots, but their new lakefront home is in need of some TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Second Generation Renovation on Georgia's Lake Arrowhead

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Take Stock: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this show from 2003, creating a better, more flavourful, faster stock and then turning that into a chicken soup ... all in less than two hours ... the dish, not the show.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Cake on Every Plate: The Reload
