programme.title: Cheap Eats: Albuquerque
programme.desc: While Albuquerque is known for hatch green chile and New Mex cuisine, Ali Khan discovers a lot more behind the hype. Ali goes sweet on a vegan waffle that delivers like a decadent desert; then makes way for the best green chile cheeseburger in town.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big Sky, Big Game, Big Flavor!
programme.desc: Ali's expedition for the best deals in Bozeman, Mont., begins with farm-to-table fresh benedict and summer sausage before hunting down a made-from-scratch elk burger.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Music City Munchies
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Nashville for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. Ali kicks things off with a cheesy hash brown casserole covered breakfast weenie.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chowin' Down In Portland
programme.desc: Food blogger, Ali Khan, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Portland.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: San Diego Surf 'n' Turf
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best meal deals in San Diego. He starts off with Brazilian-style hash browns stuffed with eggs, cheese and garlic.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Belly Full In Buffalo
programme.desc: Ali Khan is eating his way through the best meal deals in Buffalo, starting with griddle toast logs with cream cheese filling. For lunch, he takes down a trio of flavorful and innovative tacos.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Who Can Tame the Flame?
programme.desc: Three chefs battle it out in the Fire Masters Arena for the chance to win $10,000. Tree or leaf determines the fate of the chefs in the Crossfire Round, and the Feast of Fire serves up a blissful brunch.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste
programme.desc: Chef Beau MacMillan dives into scallops; Roger Mooking travels to Texas for succulent chicken.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Travel to Los Angeles, where the weather is warm and the local food is fantastic.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Yummy in the Middle
programme.desc: It's that ooey-gooey goodness in the middle that we just can't get enough of, so we're heading straight to the middle of things to see what greatness awaits. Jeff Mauro indulges in a 100-layer vanilla creme doughnut that's full of surprises.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Miami
programme.desc: Blend of old-world immigrants and new-wave trendsetters bring a mix of flavour to Miami.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Iowa
programme.desc: Andrew discovers a world of unexpected flavors in the middle of America's heartland when he makes a visit to Iowa! From head cheese and pickled onion to a Sudanese stew, Andrew finds out that there's a lot more than meat and potatoes on the table in Iowa!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Door County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern scopes out the down-to-earth culinary traditions of scenic Door County, Wisconsin. Fresh fish from Lake Michigan and local produce defines the Nordic-influenced cuisine of this vacation getaway for nature lovers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hollywood
programme.desc: Andrew explores legendary hotspots and diverse culinary treasures in Hollywood, California. He highlights classic steak and martinis, Thai steamed whole fish, Armenian flatbread topped with minced beef and Persian ice cream.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Noodles
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern reminisces about the amazing noodle dishes he has devoured on Delicious Destinations, from Beijing's zha jiang mian to Italy's trofie al pesto and many more in between.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.desc: Even though he is clearly sick, Hiro refuses to listen to Baymax or his teammates and insists that he should not stay on the sidelines during a battle with the Mad Jacks.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks!
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Summer Belongs to You
programme.desc: It's the summer solstice and, since it's the longest day of the year, Phineas and Ferb decide to travel around the world in just one day. Not everyone believes in them, but they get some encouraging words from an unlikely pair.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Save Summer
programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Hawaiian Vacation
programme.desc: During a Hawaiian family vacation, Candace finds a cool lava rock necklace and is plagued with bad luck, so a native tells her she must take it to the top of a volcano, which spoils the cool, calm vibe she learned from a Hawaiian yoga instructor.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Last Day of Summer
programme.desc: Candace uses the last day of summer to bust her brothers, but things go out of control with Doofenshmirtz's Do-Over-Inator.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's a Mud, Mud, Mud, Mud World/ The Ballad of Badbeard
programme.desc: Grandpa tells the story of a mysterious pirate legend surrounding the old lake around their house. Candice is too scared to learn how to drive, but the boys try to help her overcome the fear.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: True Believers

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Learning Curve

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Devastating Story
programme.desc: Popular television host Skip Peterson airs an interview with college student Heather Manning, who claims she was gang raped in a fraternity house.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Granting Immunity
programme.desc: Pornographic photos from a teen girl's house party quickly go viral. Barbara's efforts to arrest the students responsible for posting the images are halted during a measles' outbreak at the school.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Parent's Nightmare
programme.desc: An 8-year-old boy disappears from school and his mother receives a ransom request. When surveillance footage shows that the boy recognized his abductor, detectives work with his mother and her ex-husband to find and arrest the suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Catfishing Teacher
programme.desc: A high school student plans a clandestine hookup with his female teacher but ends up in a far more sinister situation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Class
programme.desc: When a university student is murdered, the investigation uncovers that she was on financial aid but she had an unexplained influx of cash. Her wealthy roommate becomes a prime suspect when she is found in possession of the deceased girl's jewelry.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Impulsive
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old is diagnosed with a sexually transmitted disease, he claims he caught it from his teacher who supposedly seduced him. The teacher has a different story, and claims the student raped her.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Unorthodox
programme.desc: When a young Jewish boy is brutally attacked, the evidence leads to a disturbed classmate.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Babes

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Forasteira

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bedtime Story
programme.desc: When the girls learn that a number of relatives are going to be visiting, they reminisce about times they've had to share a bed and strange places they've had to sleep, including a train station.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Forgive Me, Father
programme.desc: Blanche and Rose plan a nice dinner at the house for Dorothy and her new boyfriend, who she later learns is a priest. She later gets another shock when she learns he plans to leave the church.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Long Day's Journey Into Marinara
programme.desc: Sophia's sister, Angela arrives in Miami for a visit and decides to move there but while she's looking for an apartment Dorothy invites her to stay with the girls. This ticks off Sophia since she thinks that Angela is after everything that she has.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Whose Face Is This, Anyway?
programme.desc: Blanche is convinced that her beauty is fading after attending her high school reunion and discovers many of her classmates have had face lifts. Meanwhile, Rose is making a home movie for class she's taking.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's Prized Pupil
programme.desc: Dorothy feels that it's her fault when her prized pupil wins a writing contest which inadvertently signals the INS that he’s an illegal alien.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: While Dorothy and Rose are planning a hospital charity banquet, Blanche falls for Jake, the caterer hired for the event. She quickly learns he's more blue jeans than a black tie which prompts her to foolishly put a stop to their romance.

programme.title: Frasier: Docudrama
programme.desc: Roz's worst fears are realized when Frasier helps her with her space documentary.

programme.title: Frasier: It Takes Two to Tangle
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles search for a rich patron to lend support for their failing prep school.

programme.title: Frasier: Forgotten But Not Gone

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne Returns

programme.title: Frasier: The Wizard and Roz

programme.title: Frasier: Semi-Decent Proposal
programme.desc: Frasier agrees to escort his former high school prom queen to her birthday party.

programme.title: Reba: Brock's Swan Song
programme.desc: Brock decides to spread his father's ashes on the golf course where his father died.

programme.title: Reba: The Story of a Divorce
programme.desc: When Reba receives her final divorce papers, Lori Ann persuades her to start dating again.

programme.title: Reba: You May Kick the Bride
programme.desc: Reba tries to persuade Brock's doubting bride, Barbra Jean, to continue with the wedding.

programme.title: Reba: Vanny Dearest
programme.desc: Reba tries to persuade Van's parents to mend their relationship with their son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Son-in-Law Dearest
programme.desc: Dorothy's daughter arrives after she learns that her husband is cheating on her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: To Catch a Neighbor
programme.desc: Two police detectives stake out the girls' home to investigate the neighbors whom are believed to be dealers in stolen gems.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Piece of Cake
programme.desc: While preparing for a friend's birthday party, the girls recall past birthdays, including Rose's surprise birthday party for Dorothy, a surprise birthday party for Blanche and a memory of Sophia's birthday involving her late-husband Sal.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Empty Nests
programme.desc: Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: The Middle: The Wonderful World of Hecks
programme.desc: When the Hecks arrive at Walt Disney World, a good time may not be had for all when a series of misfortunes threaten to put a damper on their trip.

programme.title: Reba: He's Having a Baby
programme.desc: Reba argues with Brock when she runs into him and Barbra Jean in childbirth class.

programme.title: Reba: Labor of Love

programme.title: Reba: The King and I

programme.title: Reba: Up a Treehouse Without a Paddle

programme.title: Reba: It Ain't Over Until the Redhead Sings

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates

programme.title: South Park: Margaritaville
programme.desc: Randy steps forward with a solution to fix the desperate state of the economy. Stan and Kyle find another solution and save the townspeople's finances.

programme.desc: Brenda's busy team have their duties interrupted to undergo hazardous materials training.

programme.desc: When two Catorce gang members are shot to death, Brenda and her squad must solve the case.

programme.desc: Andy and Mike delve into the mysterious overdose of a young Hollywood star and the trail of emotional destruction he left in his wake. Meanwhile, Rusty finally comes to a conclusion about how to handle the pregnancy of his biological mother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Family Law
programme.desc: When a jogger takes a nasty fall down the steps of L.A.'s storied Greek Theatre, Major Crimes finds itself investigating a divorce attorney with a lot of angry clients, and Lt. Tao goes undercover in the world of college age hookers.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dead Zone
programme.desc: While investigating a murder that has personal implications for Sanchez, the squad uncovers a much larger criminal operation. Meanwhile, Buzz comes face to face with someone that may have been present at his father's murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.desc: Prominent realtor Todd Kohlhepp’s double life is exposed when police launch a dramatic rescue – all caught on body camera – of a young woman chained like a dog inside a shipping container on his property.

programme.desc: Shayna Hubers and Ryan Poston seemed like a match made in heaven, until he ends up dead in a pool of blood, shot in the face. Stunning interrogation tapes leave cops in disbelief and lead investigators to a surprising motive.

programme.desc: A mysterious tip leads police in Moore, Oklahoma to the Super 8 hotel. Inside Room 120, they find a missing teenage boy, a box of condoms, lotion, and a married state senator.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Shark River Mystery
programme.desc: Sarah Stern vanishes just before Christmas, her car found abandoned by Shark River. But the missing persons case soon turns into a homicide, and cops start focusing on a prom date.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: One October: Massacre on the Strip
programme.desc: Stephen Paddock lived the lifestyle of the rich and famous in Las Vegas. Gambling up to $1M a day, he was known as a ‘whale.’ But a trip to Vegas in October, 2017 leaves 58 dead.

programme.desc: An eye-popping decision bordering on reckless puts a survivalist's challenge at risk. Two camps go head-to-head when one team sabotages the other's hunt. A tribe begins an epic project to take on the swamp, building a primitive canoe from a downed log.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: Cold Grudges Die Hard
programme.desc: Sub-freezing temperatures descend on the swamp, putting two survivalists on the brink. Rylie finally resolves lingering resentment from a past challenge. Desperate for more resources, Max and EJ see if their canoe can take them to better hunting grounds.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: Cold Grudges Die Hard
programme.desc: Two survivalists confront sub-freezing temperatures in the swamp. Rylie resolves lingering resentment from an earlier challenge while Max and EJ take their canoe to new hunting grounds.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: No Rain, No Gain

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Water Chaos
programme.desc: Hailstorms, lightning and super cells unleash hell. Helicopters ignite the air and snow-mageddon hits Tucson. Mysterious circles form in Namibia, sharks descend on Brisbane and fish wash ashore in India.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Technicolor Weather
programme.desc: From Sapphire caves to bizarre blue lava and rainbow clouds, this episode exposes the invisible forces behind the strangest, most beautiful events the planet. Featuring forces that eat snow, create perfect clear cubes and cause walrus gatherings.

programme.title: Weird Earth: A Boiling River and an Electric Angel
programme.desc: Should satellite images of violent vortexes above a volcanic island be cause for alarm?

programme.title: Weird Earth: Bug-nado's and Parting Seas
programme.desc: A twisting swarm of menacing aerial creatures glides above suburbia. Are bizarrely parting seas connected to ancient legends? And could hair-like fibres be a deadly product of a volcano?

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Twister Terror
programme.desc: April 9, 2015, a devastating tornado causes havoc in Illinois. In Rochelle, many locals become trapped - in their homes and on the highway. Local restaurant customers seek shelter in a cellar.

programme.title: Dangerous Day Ahead
programme.desc: A look back on the storm chasing activities of the Samaras team, who were killed in the May 31st tornado in El Reno. From their origins, to their last terrifying minutes when they were caught in the storm, family and friends recall the lost team.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Bug-nado's and Parting Seas

programme.title: Oklahoma: Tornado Target

programme.title: Tornado Alley: I Survived: Path of Destruction
programme.desc: Strangers seek shelter in a frozen yogurt stop as a tornado hits Joplin, Missouri; a family looks to their neighbors for help after winds devastate their small town and parents use their cell phone to save the life of their daughter during a storm.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Twisted Believers: The Weather Made Me Do It
programme.desc: People can be influenced by extreme weather in unconventional ways. Some think that the spirits of those killed by tornadoes live on, some think that extreme weather conditions are used by extraterrestrials and some think that elusive creatures come out.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Real Time Moore

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: An angry taxi driver gives Ponytail a piece of his mind; a woman looks for her car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: An angry man can't retrieve the rental car that was towed when he took his wife to the hospital.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Shawn must deal with parking violators as he tries to keep the streets safe for kids.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: In Detroit, a day releasing boots turns wild for Rodney when a man tries to drive off in the middle of a tow.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Charles is called every name in the book except his real one as he tries to keep the bus lane clear.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Evelyn faces an angry violator as she patrols the Italian neighbourhood in Providence.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Rodney and Sonjia boot a man who insists he's already paid all his tickets.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Ponytail runs into furious Detroit citizens as he tries to catch early bird violators, and argumentative repeat offenders confront Bonnie on her beat.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: A football player uses his body to block his mama's car from being towed.

programme.title: Gene Simmons Family Jewels: A Bun in the Oven
programme.desc: While Nick, Sophie and Aunt Tracy await the results of Shannon's pregnancy test, Gene and fellow KISS band member Paul Stanley serve as the Grand Marshals of the NYC Halloween Parade. Later, Gene learns whether he'll be a father again.

programme.title: Gene Simmons Family Jewels: Gene's Big Mouth
programme.desc: Gene's suggestion that he and Shannon adopt a child is music to her ears. While Gene chases his lost precious black book from one end of Manhattan to the other, Shannon has a surprise waiting for him at home: a six-month-old baby boy.

programme.title: Gene Simmons Family Jewels: Stir Crazy
programme.desc: A bruised and weary Shannon returns home. Wrapped head to toe and heavily sedated, she and Gene begin recuperating at opposite ends of their mansion, and drive the whole family crazy in the process.

programme.title: Gene Simmons Family Jewels: Coming Out Party
programme.desc: Gene's inability to follow doctor's orders is hampering his recovery. Nick reluctantly attends a bachelor charity event in Gene's place, and is shocked to learn who placed the winning bid.

programme.title: Gene Simmons Family Jewels: Gene's Best Friend
programme.desc: As Gene prepares for his impending lie detector test on 'The Adam Carolla Show,' his best friend and loyal canine Snippy goes missing. To add more fuel to the fire, Gene's partner Paul Stanley falls ill moments before taking the stage.

programme.title: Gene Simmons Family Jewels: Shannon to the Rescue
programme.desc: Shannon enlists Gene's help when she fears that Tracy has run off to Hawaii to elope with her new man.

programme.title: Gene Simmons Family Jewels: Honeymoon at Last
programme.desc: After Tracy's elopement fiasco, Gene tries to make it up to Shannon and decides to give her a honeymoon.

programme.title: Gene Simmons Family Jewels: Derby Queen
programme.desc: When the kids convince Shannon to return to acting after she is offered a role in a new Roller Derby exploitation film, roles are reversed and Gene becomes the homemaker and Shannon the breadwinner.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q take to the ice for a very slippery game. Then they head to the park to get support for some ridiculous causes, and tonight's loser is forced to relive the sins of his past before a captive, critical audience.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dream Crusher
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers until a special guest crashes the party, they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stripteased
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal return to the dentist's office, then try to make each other laugh in a food court tournament. Then, the big loser strips for a rowdy group of ladies who will never be able to un-see the sorry state of his skin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Your Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr pose as avant-garde photographers in a Staten Island park and get animated when pitching to a focus group.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: HellCopter
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q pose as unreceptive receptionists in an office waiting room, then head to a wax museum where they mingle with the stiff crowd. And in tonight’s double punishment, two losers are taken on a chopper ride from hell.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers to help them bury bizarre items, and then they try to cling onto strangers’ cars. The big loser makes enemies at an auction house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Punished
programme.desc: The guys pose as cranky NY cab drivers, then solicit undeserved congrats in the park. Then, tonight's loser is sheriff of an old Nevada town.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: The guys illustrate their lack of skill as caricature artists in the mall, demonstrate their odd living habits while interviewing for roommates, and try to cut the line for Broadway tickets in Times Square.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Panty Raid
programme.desc: The guys massage beachgoers on the boardwalk, broadcast the news from Times Square, and get their kicks teaching a karate class.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of TP
programme.desc: The guys swipe food off other diners' plates at a buffet, tutor students in foreign languages they don't speak, and try to start a dance party in a public park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Who Arted
programme.desc: The guys conduct a focus group with unique consumer questioning, are totally unfit as trainers in a gym class, and pretend to work at a famous New York bakery.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Do Something to My Face
programme.desc: The guys enlist shoppers to settle senseless debates in the mall, scream for ice-cream as patrons in a parlour and protest unconventional causes in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sound EffeXXX
programme.desc: The guys debut uninspiring inventions to stunned focus groups, use people for pillows as they fall asleep in the park, and talk shoppers out of their desired products in a grocery store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: The guys search for imaginary places with a little help from strangers, pick their own poison in the park, and there's a surprise behind every door in the horrifying hunt for a house sitter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Psychotic Not-line
programme.desc: The guys endure a shakedown in a discount store, put their fate in the hands of the 'Wheel of Doom' and try to hack it as Hibachi chefs.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: The guys face off as optometrists, they break each others’ banks giving bad financial advice, and push outrageous political platforms in a fruitless hunt for votes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Love Expert
programme.desc: The guys lose their rhythm while teaching dance class and try to hock tickets to Broadway.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside the Vault
programme.desc: The guys meet after the show to talk about their favourite moments during the show, not to mention the most uncomfortable, most embarrassing, most humiliating and most outrageous. Viewers get a chance to hear all about the behind-the-scenes mishaps.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr head to the Lone Star state in a special episode that proves even embarrassment is bigger in Texas. The city boys from New York whip up trouble teaching cowboy skills on a ranch, then sell Western wear.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: The guys give a taste of their awkward customer service at a liquor store, take tickets of humiliation at a deli counter and try to get signatures to recognize phony holidays. Tonight’s losers pay a frigid price in a cold-hearted double punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr try to warm up to strangers at a ski lodge and pull up a chair as uninvited guests at an Italian restaurant. And tonight’s punishment takes the cake when the loser is the surprise entertainer at the wrong party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Anniversary Edition
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr celebrate three years of embarrassing each other on this special anniversary edition. The guys reveal some never-before-seen bonus footage of their favorite moments from the vault.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The guys freeze out skaters at an ice rink's rental counter, and head to the mall where they have the audacity to ask strangers to mind their manners. Then, tonight's loser is down for the count after donning a diaper for a sumo-sized punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q freak out a focus group by reading ridiculous answers, and then participate in a thrilling toilet paper shootout in their favourite market. Plus, the loser’s fancy dinner party turns into the messiest ride of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bathroom Break
programme.desc: The guys get sassy while posing as auto parts salesmen, then head to the mall where they try to reel in unsuspecting shoppers. Tonight's big loser is stuck in a horrible mess after being locked inside a rigged bathroom of horrors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.desc: Cam is finally getting a chance to shine when he is asked to preside over the high school graduation ceremony at the last minute, while Jay gives the commencement address. Meanwhile, Claire runs into her former high school rival.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Year of Birthdays
programme.desc: As the birth of Haley and Dylan’s twins approaches we take a look back at how each family member celebrated their birthdays this past year.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and the Country
programme.desc: Samantha joins Carrie at Aidan's cottage in the country where she meets a cute farmer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Belles of the Balls
programme.desc: Carrie helps Aidan and Big learn to accept each other, while Miranda and Steve get closer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Coulda, Woulda, Shoulda
programme.desc: Miranda reveals that she's pregnant, and after much deliberation, she decides to have the baby. Meanwhile, Samantha uses her connection as a representative for Lucy Liu to her advantage so she can nab a great handbag.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Non-Bon Voyage
programme.desc: The family flies to St. Bart's to forget their troubles, but drama has a way of following them. Kourtney is distracted when she gets disturbing news about Scott and Kendall has beef with Kylie for bring her boyfriend Tyga.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Return From Paradise
programme.desc: With only a few days left in paradise, Kendall and Kylie try to sort out their differences while Kim and Khloé help Kourtney try to forget Scott and get her mojo back. When the family returns home, a visit from Scott throws them all for a loop.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Big Launch
programme.desc: When Kourtney isn't ready for a big product launch in NYC, her sisters help her get her head in the game. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Kim accidently upsets her best friend Jonathan. Kim makes sure Kylie is making the most of her newfound opportunities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board. Meanwhile Kendall struggles to find a balance in her relationship with Caitlyn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Miscommunication
programme.desc: Kris decides the family needs 'Communication Therapy,' but her plans backfire when she misses one of the sessions. Kylie is finally ready to celebrate her new home but her family's bossy ways get in the way of her plans.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Reunion Road Trip: Queer Eye for the Straight Guy
programme.desc: The OG Fab Five from 'Queer Eye for the Straight Guy' reunite to surprise one of their own with an amazing makeover and birthday party. They also reminisce about their favorite moments from the show and how they completely changed television.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: We chat with three-time Olympian Dominique Dawes about making history as a gymnast and motherhood.

programme.title: Movie: Last Holiday
programme.desc: When a department store clerk finds out she's got three weeks to live, she decides to cash in her savings and live it up in Europe.

programme.title: We Got Love Teyana and Iman: Meet the Shumperts
programme.desc: Power couple, Teyana Taylor and Iman Shumpert, face big transitions in their lives. With Teyana’s recent retirement from music and Iman’s NBA career on hold, they turn their attention to their daughter, Junie, who has ambitions of her own.

programme.title: Modern Family: Pilot
programme.desc: A satirical look at three different families and the trials they deal with in life.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Bicycle Thief
programme.desc: Phil is determined to help Luke prove to his mom that he is responsible enough to have the brand new bike they just got him. However, Phil ends up being the irresponsible one when a hot neighbour clouds his judgment.

programme.title: Modern Family: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: After some nudging, Jay begrudgingly takes Phil out to fly his new model airplane, but a manoeuvre goes awry. Meanwhile, when Gloria drops Manny off to play with Luke, she ends up volunteering to take Alex dress shopping.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Incident
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell's mother drops in for a surprise visit, determined to make amends with everyone she offended during what has been deemed 'The Incident' at Jay and Gloria's wedding. No one is happy to see her, and it all comes to a head at dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Three cheese pros return to Flavortown to test their talents against some of GGG's cheesiest chefs. Guy Fieri puts the competitors through two rounds of deliciously cheesy combat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Top Ten Burgers
programme.desc: Guy's had a lot of burgers on DDD and we asked you to vote for your Top 10 favourites of all time. From old school to gourmet, it's a countdown of the most creative and delicious combinations found in Flavortown.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: BBQ, Pubs and Local Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hittin' up BBQ joints and pubs and checkin' out the local grub. In Pacifica, Calif., he revisits an old barbecue buddy to check out his take on pork ribs and a new spin on an old standby.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bird and Beef
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, an amped up deli serves up lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wildest Joints
programme.desc: On DDD, Guy has seen it all, and he has the scoop on the some of the wackiest and wildest joints out there. These joints may be wacky, but the food is off the chain.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Beach Bite Battle
programme.desc: The four remaining food truck teams meet host Tyler Florence on the beach to create their own signature beachside snack. Judges award $300 to the team with the most-delicious beach bite, and the team that sells the most treats earns $300 as well.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Mission: Impastable
programme.desc: Food Network's Chef Anne Burrell brings rising star comedian Jaboukie Young White from The Daily Show to hit Bobby Flay with some breaking news: He's going down. They recruit Italian expert chefs Nicole Karr and David Benstock to make Bobby say 'Ciao.'

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Use Your Noodle
programme.desc: The chips are all in when world-traveled chef Philippe Haddad meets New York's Chef Melissa O'Donnell. It's up to Scott Conant and Geoffrey Zakarian to place their bets on the chef who they think can beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Waltz Up A Win
programme.desc: Dancing with the Stars' Derek Hough and food personality Carla Hall taste, tango and decide who to whisk up to compete against Bobby Flay. Doughnut queen Katy Gerdes and French-trained chef Olivier Palazzo face off in this sweet culinary cook-off.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Getting Crabby
programme.desc: A country boy and a Greco chef challenge Bobby.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Gardening with Julie
programme.desc: Now that she's no longer on her world tour, Trisha Yearwood finally has time to grow fresh veggies in her garden and she's enlisting one of her close friends for help. Together they whip up a delicious lunch that includes creamy corn and Chile dip.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: 20th Anniversary at the Opry
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood celebrates her 20th year as the 20th female member of the Grand Ole Opry by cooking up riffs on her greatest culinary hits from the past two decades. Her menu includes pepper jack cheese straws and smokey maple bacon sweet potato.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Album Release Party
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is celebrating the release of her album, 'Every Girl', with a special party for her songwriters and collaborators.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Brunch Spread
programme.desc: It's time for brunch in Michael Symon's backyard. He makes homemade bagels with poppy seeds and sesame seeds, and his wife, Liz, whips up homemade cream cheese to go with them. Michael also makes planked everything bagel-spiced salmon.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Upgrades
programme.desc: The Kitchen takes summer staples to the next level with trending new flavours and recipes like Geoffrey Zakarian's tuna steak burger and Katie Lee's Greek chicken and orzo pasta salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Staycation
programme.desc: The Kitchen is using international flavors to turn summer vacation into a global staycation. Sunny brings Portuguese and South African flair with her very peri chicken and Geoffrey adds a taste of Japan with his shishito peppers with chili and lime.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spice It Up!
programme.desc: The Kitchen is firing on all cylinders with spicy, flavorful recipes, including a fried chicken sandwich with gochujang glaze, chipotle carrot soup and shrimp cocktail with lemon. Plus, Chef Duff Goldman stops by to chat about his new discovery+ show.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer's Perfect Meal
programme.desc: The hosts plate up a perfect summer meal with dishes like Geoffrey' cheesy stuffed lamb burger and Jeff' butter and chive salt potatoes. Chef Kardea Brown stops by to share her recipe for grilled watermelon salad and sweet and spicy vinaigrette.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ruling With an Iron Fist
programme.desc: Two of the toughest judges from Iron Chef, Simon Majumdar and Donatella Arpaia, come to Bobby's arena. These two know exactly what to look for in a contender.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: No Training Wheels
programme.desc: Actor and chef David Burtka teams up with Food Network's Alex Guarnaschelli to beat the king of competition cooking, Bobby Flay, as self-taught chefs Johnny Zone and Jumoke Jackson battle for the right to dethrone him.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby-Bing Bobby-Boom!
programme.desc: Bobby will have his work cut out for him against two tough Italian chefs and he'll get no sympathy from "Kitchen Cousins" Anthony Carrino and John Colaneri or from Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli. It's time to see if Bobby has what it takes to be on top.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Frenemies
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Debi Mazar, two of Bobby Flay's closest friends, stop by for a visit, but their intentions aren't all good.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pie in the Sky

programme.title: Movie: Indiscretion

programme.title: Movie: A Killer Upstairs
programme.desc: An overprotective mother starts her own investigation when her son is arrested and tried for murdering his married lover.

programme.title: Movie: His Double Life
programme.desc: Five years after her husband dies, a woman is remarried to her deceased husband's business partner. Her daughter discovers that he is having an affair, and the following day, the mysterious other woman also turns up dead.

programme.title: Movie: Mommy, I Didn't Do It
programme.desc: Julie is charged with murdering a teacher she was rumored to be having an illicit affair with. Ellen Plainview knows that she can't trust anyone but herself to defend her daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Tutor
programme.desc: A single mother is focused on getting her daughter off to college. She hires her a tutor to help with her grades, but soon, the tutor becomes obsessed with his student.

programme.title: Movie: Erasing His Dark Past
programme.desc: A woman's husband is presumed dead, but when she tries to get his affairs in order she discovers he was not the man she thought. When he turns up alive having faked his own death, he kidnaps her daughter and forces her to find a way to escape.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Bronx UFO and More

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Bio UFO Over California and More
programme.desc: A shadow figure lurks in the halls of an abandoned asylum. UFO enthusiasts get the sighting of a lifetime in Southern California. A guardian angel saves a man from a horrific accident.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: A Tribute to Trapper
programme.desc: The remaining members of the AIMS team gather around a campfire to celebrate the life of team leader and friend John 'Trapper' Tice. Tears are shed and laughter echoes throughout the Appalachian night sky as they relive their favorite Trapper moments.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Wolves of West Virginia
programme.desc: The surviving members of AIMS head out on a brand-new adventure that team leader Trapper set up for them before he passed. Equipped with Trapper's journal, they travel to the mountains of the Tygart Valley to prove there are still wolves in West Virginia.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: K-9 Tracks by the Grave
programme.desc: A grisly discovery spurs the AIMS team to find out what monster lurks in the shadows of West Virginia's Tygart Valley. Using Trapper's journal, they devise an ingenious way to get footprints to help identify the mysterious predator.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: By the Fire: Sheepsquatch
programme.desc: The AIMS team gathers around a campfire to reminisce over one of their strangest monster encounters. The bearded brothers have their most bizarre conversation yet as Huckleberry and Jeff compete to see how many peanuts they can fit in their bellybuttons.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: Bigfoot of Lincoln County
programme.desc: Appalachian Investigators of Mysterious Sightings travel to Lincoln County, WV to investigate the Hellhound who left a bad taste in their mouth after evading them last autumn.

programme.desc: Don Wildman recounts a desperate race to escape a raging wildfire, investigates a real-life sea monster that made a splash along the New England coastline, and reveals an explosive discovery in the heart of NYC.

programme.desc: Don Wildman untangles a deadly web of secrets in Florida, recalls an epic quest to find a city paved in gold, and investigates a life-changing accident that revolutionized the entertainment world.

programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a toxic experiment gone wrong, recalls the hunt for a fabled train laden with Nazi gold, and uncovers a devilish plot to assassinate Pope John Paul II.

programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a fiery disaster that shocked the nation, brings a global conspiracy to light, and recounts a teen girl's fight to survive against the odds after a deadly plane crash.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Serial Mourner, Ground Zero Flag and Jefferson's Wine

programme.title: Snapped: Samantha Wohlford
programme.desc: When a young Texas father is abducted without a trace and later found murdered, Titus County investigators follow a leery trail of cell phone records and internet history to reveal a dangerous conspiracy fueled by a manipulative mastermind.

programme.title: Dateline: A Deadly Path

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Polnado Warning
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is busy with patients when the tornado sirens start blaring. The whole clinic, including pets and owners must head to the basement for their safety and ride out the storm.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: All Vets Are Off
programme.desc: We revisit spring, the busiest time of the year at the clinic. For Dr. Pol, that means long and tiring days. We check back on his search for another veterinarian.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Udder Madness
programme.desc: Featuring emergencies with Dr. Pol and his staff.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Down and Derby
programme.desc: Many appointments and calls have the team as busy as ever.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Holy Bat Attack!
programme.desc: A bat bites Dr. Pol and a positive rabies test could endanger the health of his whole family. Dr. Brenda struggles to treat a puppy that swallowed a pork bone.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef: Miracle of the Reef
programme.desc: Explore the complex Great Barrier Reef along with the wildlife that inhabit it.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef: Reef to Rainforest
programme.desc: The Great Barrier Reef hosts diverse habitats – each depending on the other to survive.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef: Beyond the Reef
programme.desc: Weather systems and climate change will shape the future of the Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Desert of the Red Kangaroo
programme.desc: In the heart of Australia lives the red kangaroo, the largest marsupial on earth and a true master of adapting to the blistering desert heat.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Jurassic Jungle
programme.desc: The Australian tropics are perhaps the most mysterious part of the country. Impenetrable rainforest hides kangaroos that live in trees and a colossal bird with dinosaur feet.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the Real Atlantis
programme.desc: A mysterious ruined city in Greece is the home of the mythical Labyrinth and the Minotaur, and its catastrophic downfall might have inspired the legend of Atlantis. New discoveries at this site reveal a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Stone Age
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets and ritual of the people who build the world's largest stone circle.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: King Arthur's Lost Castle
programme.desc: The clifftop ruins of Tintagel Castle are shrouded in a tumultuous history and believed to be the birthplace of King Arthur. Experts use cutting-edge tech to unlock the secrets of this ancient structure and reveal the truth behind a legendary ruler.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Desert Kings
programme.desc: The ancient city of Samarra contains a series of medieval structures that hold secrets to one of the world's greatest empires; now, archaeologists use pioneering technology to investigate its astonishing rise to power and reveal its monumental downfall.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Mysteries of Ethiopia's Ark
programme.desc: Some allege that the Ark of the Covenant was stolen by King Solomon's son and taken to Ethiopia thousands of years ago. Now, archaeologists investigate new, mysterious leads to uncover the secrets behind this lost relic's elusive journey.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Buried Beneath Jerusalem
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Desert Kings
programme.desc: The ancient city of Samarra contains a series of medieval structures that hold secrets to one of the world's greatest empires; now, archaeologists use pioneering technology to investigate its astonishing rise to power and reveal its monumental downfall.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Mysteries of Ethiopia's Ark
programme.desc: Some allege that the Ark of the Covenant was stolen by King Solomon's son and taken to Ethiopia thousands of years ago. Now, archaeologists investigate new, mysterious leads to uncover the secrets behind this lost relic's elusive journey.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Buried Beneath Jerusalem
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Unearthed: King Arthur's Lost Castle
programme.desc: The clifftop ruins of Tintagel Castle are shrouded in a tumultuous history and believed to be the birthplace of King Arthur. Experts use cutting-edge tech to unlock the secrets of this ancient structure and reveal the truth behind a legendary ruler.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Attack of the Thunderballs
programme.desc: Astronauts are evacuated when a mystery object is discovered hurtling towards the ISS, a NASA secret agent goes undercover to recover missing moon rocks and scientists struggle to find answers when they find a huge void at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Earth Have Two Moons?
programme.desc: A starling discovery suggests that the hellish clouds of Venus may be the origin of life on Earth. A bizarre sighting 2,000 years ago raises the possibility that the Earth once had two moons. A NASA scientist helps the FBI crack the 1996 Olympic bombing.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Invisible Planet
programme.desc: A probe carrying a message to aliens mysteriously malfunctions as it enters deep space. A NASA mission goes disastrously wrong when an imposter breaches Mission Control. Astronomers find evidence of an invisible planet in a distant solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Ghosts on the Moon
programme.desc: Topics include: spaceships powered by atomic bombs, artificial rings encircling an entire star, Neil Armstrong's transmission feed cutting off when he spotted strange lights on the moon and lightning talking to itself.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Revenge of the Fireflies
programme.desc: NASA investigates so called space fireflies that are attacking the brains of astronauts.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Ice Creatures
programme.desc: Neil Armstrong goes into an unexplained spin. He needs to figure out what's causing it, or he faces certain death. An Apollo 17 photo seems to show a U.S. military outpost on the moon. Could there be alien life swimming in the oceans of Jupiter's moons?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Nazis on the Moon
programme.desc: A Russian probe discovers something has disturbed the lunar soil before the US or the USSR got there.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens vs. Stalin at Area 51
programme.desc: When a former Area 51 insider alleges that the Roswell UFO incident was a nefarious Soviet conspiracy masterminded by Stalin, experts investigate if it was indeed an enemy plot against America, or whether the confession is just another cover-up.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Ghosts on a Comet
programme.desc: When a Chinese moon rover breaks down, a NASA scientist points to a mysterious material that seemed to sabotage the Apollo missions decades earlier. The Rosetta spacecraft finds a comet that appears to be singing.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Interstellar Gold Rush
programme.desc: A distant planet shows evidence of an Earth-like atmosphere, while a mysterious glowing light suggests the impossible - an atmosphere on the Moon. Have we found evidence of a crashed alien ship on the asteroid belt and why are there blueberries on Mars?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Aliens Nuke Mars?
programme.desc: Experts investigate if an extraterrestrial Armageddon transformed Mars into the wasteland we know today, after a strange discovery by the Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hunting Season
programme.desc: A 27 year old mother of two disappeared from a small vacation town in Wisconsin in 2008. Family, friends, local reporters and police investigators recall the fear and sadness the shocking crime instilled on their tight-knit community.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: American Monster: Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: High achieving Keonte Chavis has always relied on her big, loving family to support her dreams. But when a sudden disappearance leads to a disturbing murder, they all face a dark and terrifying reality - the predator is one of their own.

programme.title: The Beatrice Six: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: Six people were convicted of the brutal 1985 murder of Helen Wilson in Beatrice, Nebraska. Three even confessed. But Joseph White's two-decade fight to prove his innocence would turn the case and the town upside down.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Thunderbolt
programme.desc: When a couple is found shot down in front of their home in the quiet suburb of Thunderbolt, the entire community hears the barrage of gunfire. As police sift through the evidence they must determine if one of the neighbors is a witness or the killer.

programme.title: The Beatrice Six: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: Six people were convicted of the brutal 1985 murder of Helen Wilson in Beatrice, Nebraska. Three even confessed. But Joseph White's two-decade fight to prove his innocence would turn the case and the town upside down.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Classified Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating a couple's mysterious disappearance uncover a trail of terrifying clues.

programme.title: American Monster: Anything for You
programme.desc: The Snyders are thrilled when their 34-year-old son Mike finally starts a family with his sweetheart - as seen in these home videos. But after being diagnosed with a terrible illness, Mike vanishes. Only years later does his horrific fate comes to light.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Demon in His Eyes
programme.desc: As children, Betty and Ulayla adored their little brother, Johnny, and tried to protect him. As they got older, Johnny did strange things, but they never believed he was capable of pure evil until he confessed a horrible secret.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Date with Dystiny
programme.desc: When firefighters extinguish a California brush fire, they unexpectedly ignite a twisted murder mystery- rife with forced prostitution, burning jealousy, and an almost unthinkable murder mastermind.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Amish Stud
programme.desc: When a young Amish wife is found murdered in her bed, police uncover a dark world they never imagine existed.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Original Amish Murderer
programme.desc: When Katie Gingerich is found murdered and disemboweled, even the most hardened police are shocked.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Kill List
programme.desc: Prison Valley is rocked by the murder of Prisons Chief Tom Clements. The cops think it's part of a wider plot, and they're running out of time to catch the killer.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: The Art of Murder
programme.desc: As 22 year old Kristin Huggins is about to make her artistic debut she suddenly disappears. Soon its clear that the painter from PA had a brush with disaster in nearby NJ. Despite their best efforts, it takes cops quite some time to catch her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Bringing Brooke Home
programme.desc: Dateline explores the abduction of 19-year-old Oregon student Brooke Wilberger and how a similar abduction in New Mexico helped crack the case. The report includes interviews with family members and former New Mexico governor Bill Richardson.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Midnight Murders
programme.desc: Carla Stefaniak, a spirited Florida insurance agent with a passion for travel, heads to Costa Rica. But on the day she's supposed to return, she vanishes. And in 2014, 19-year-old college student Pravin Varughese disappears after a party.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Blood, Sweat, and Tears
programme.desc: An ominous mystery grips a small, seaside town when the husband of a competitive bodybuilder abruptly disappears. Puzzling sightings, shocking revelations and bizarre deceptions eventually lead police to a grisly discovery where it's least expected.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: The Libertyville Horror
programme.desc: This infamous house in Old Louisville, Kentucky has dark secrets lurking within its walls.

programme.title: The Crimes That Changed Us: The Menendez Brothers
programme.desc: When a Hollywood executive and his wife are brutally killed in a wealthy neighbourhood, suspicion falls on their two sons. Charged with the murders, the brothers reveal disturbing family secrets, and the scene is set for one of the most shocking trials.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Armor
programme.desc: An in-depth, action-packed look at the most advanced armor technologies, from body armor to heavy duty composites that make the Abrams tank the best protected and the most lethal vehicle on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Ultimate Firepower
programme.desc: A showcase of the heaviest hitting military hardware on the planet.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.
