programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Carving Out a Life
programme.desc: In New Freeport, Pennsylvania, the Barnwood Builders save a cabin with incredible stone work, and the guys learn pioneer stone techniques from a local expert. Later, Mark visits two incredible restorations and Alex makes a barnwood wedding gift.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cabin on a Cliff
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders face an uphill battle.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Boneyard Makeover
programme.desc: The team transforms the Boneyard by enclosing part of their shed with walls so they can work year-round, finishing off their new workspace by covering one wall with multi-colored barn wood.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hidden History
programme.desc: The crew saves an Ohio barn built with incredible craftsmanship and Mark scouts another barn that turns out to be a keeper. Later, he visits a massive timber-frame barn that was perfectly restored on its original site and converted into a restaurant.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Deep Creek Dreaming
programme.desc: Two couples team up to buy their dream vacation house on Deep Creek Lake, Maryland. Their agreed upon must-haves include water views and space for nine people. However, finding a property that both couples agree on may be a challenge.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Lakefront Overhaul
programme.desc: A couple with renovation know-how is looking for a fixer-upper lake house near Weiss Lake in Alabama.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Jackson Lake Remake
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy lives in Atlanta with a vacation home on Jackson Lake, Georgia. They find the ideal property for their blended family, including three kids, but face a growing renovation list on a tight budget.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Georgia Reno on Their Minds
programme.desc: Outdoor enthusiasts John and Heather are looking for a vacation retreat for their family on Lake Oconee in Georgia, and they find a fixer-upper in an ideal setting.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Next Up: Niagara
programme.desc: A couple seek a property along Lake Ontario in Niagara County that could be an escape for the family, but needs some work. They are no strangers to renovations, but with a tight budget they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Top 10 Island Escapes
programme.desc: Chase, Ryan, and Ashley countdown their favorite island camps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Top Ten Waterfront Cabins
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Small Town to Farmville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Nederland Heritage Festival, where food from around the world is prepared by an army of volunteers. From the cowboy pistolettes to sopapillas to chicken fried bacon and a very fun egg-stravaganza, see all the delicious delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mac and Cheese and Monster Meat
programme.desc: Noah takes a bite out of the Great New York State Fair where The Defibrillator gets his heart pumping. Then he tries on two local favorites -- the piquant Buffalo chicken mac and cheese and the crispy clamwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Some Like It Popped
programme.desc: Noah hits the Big Butler Fair in Prospect, PA., where he tears into the Conevore, filled to the brim with smoked brisket, pork and chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fry Harder
programme.desc: Noah Cappe soaks up the California sunshine while enjoying some wacky West Coast treats at the San Diego County Fair in Del Mar, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: A Football Life: Tony Romo
programme.desc: Tony Romo went from a young man in Wisconsin with a love for sports to the quarterback of the Dallas Cowboys for nearly a decade.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jerry Jones
programme.desc: Follow Jerry Jones's career from humble beginnings as a greeter in his parents' grocery store in Arkansas to his induction into the Pro Football Hall of Fame.

programme.title: A Football Life: Charles Haley
programme.desc: The only player in NFL history with five Super Bowl rings, Charles Haley's road to Canton was paved with memorable stops in Dallas and San Francisco.

programme.title: A Football Life: Terrell Owens
programme.desc: An unvarnished look at one of the most talented and polarizing players in NFL history.

programme.title: A Football Life: Steve Young
programme.desc: The long climb to the top for Hall of Fame quarterback Steve Young, as told by Young himself through excerpts from his autobiography.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jerry Rice
programme.desc: 'A Football Life' chronicles the story of how an un-recruited small-town wide receiver became the greatest of all time.

programme.title: A Football Life: Ronnie Lott
programme.desc: Hall of Famer Ronnie Lott helped lead the San Francisco 49ers defense that won four Super Bowls.

programme.title: A Football Life: Dwight Clark
programme.desc: Look at the life and career of former 49ers wide receiver Dwight Clark. After thinking he wouldn't make the team, Dwight Clark went on to star for San Francisco during their peak in the 1980s and make one of the most memorable catches of all time.

programme.title: A Football Life: Bill Walsh
programme.desc: Bill Walsh was labeled a genius, but he also was an insecure, tortured artist. After revolutionizing the NFL with the 'Team of the '80s', he wrote a book that has become the bible for generations of football coaches.

programme.title: The American Game: Integration
programme.desc: As much as any other sport, the history of college football tells the history of American race relations. You can't appreciate the sport's complexities without knowing how long the road has been, and continues to be, towards equal rights.

programme.title: The American Game: Evolution
programme.desc: College football has evolved in so many transformative ways. All throughout its history, the sport's constant evolutions have had common threads, with officials and coaches striving to make it safer, more exciting and more entertaining.

programme.title: The American Game: Recruiting
programme.desc: Everything starts with the quality of the players that a school is able to recruit. Since college football's earliest days, recruiting has been one of the most critical and controversial aspects of the sport.

programme.title: The American Game: Television
programme.desc: There was once a concern that airing college football games on television would hurt the sport's popularity. All these years later, it's a multi-billion-dollar business and the story of college football on television is its own saga.

programme.desc: Mike gets his ego hurt during a bowling date with Molly.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike's Not Ready
programme.desc: Mike and Molly get their signals crossed when she invites him into her house after a date and he turns her down.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Gift of the Mike Guy
programme.desc: Mike tries to find the perfect gift for Ed, which proves more difficult than he thought, and Vanessa tries to bring the family back together for their Christmas decorating tradition.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Three for the Road
programme.desc: When Mike offers to take Boyd on a fishing trip, Ryan objects, as his plans interfere with an existing trip he made with his son. Boyd insists the three take a trip together, forcing Mike and Ryan to get along.

programme.title: Black-ish: Public Fool
programme.desc: An incident at school threatens Junior's future at his beloved Valley Glen Prep.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Liberals Dre and Bow go ballistic when Junior declares he's joined the Young Republican Club to impress a girl (ironically named Hillary). Meanwhile, everyone teases Zoey when she finds out she needs glasses.

programme.title: DC's Legends of Tomorrow: Stressed Western
programme.desc: The Legends find themselves looking to Nate to keep everything calm while in he the old West on a mission to find an alien. Sara reveals her secret to Ava and the team. Constantine looks to Cary who might have the answer to help his problem.

programme.title: Batwoman: Power
programme.desc: Ryan questions her place as the city's hero. Alice's attempt to rescue her sister means another encounter with Circe. Unexpected alliances and transformations will upend Gotham as we know it.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Pez Dispenser
programme.desc: Jerry's practical joke on Elaine during a show causes problems with George's relationship.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Fix-Up
programme.desc: Trouble ensues when Jerry and Elaine play matchmaker for George by setting him up with Elaine's single friend.

programme.title: Mom: Eight Cats and the Hat Show
programme.desc: Christy is blindsided by a surprising offer from her boyfriend. Bonnie struggles to be the stable one in her relationship after Adam experiences a devastating loss.

programme.title: Mom: Crazy Snakes and a Clog to the Head
programme.desc: When the ladies bring a meeting to a women's prison, Bonnie is attacked by an old acquaintance and Christy helps Bonnie make amends.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And Strokes of Goodwill
programme.desc: Max introduces Caroline to the art of thrift store shopping, which takes a dangerous turn when a battle erupts over a T-shirt.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Rich People Problems
programme.desc: Max gets a glimpse of Caroline's former life of luxury when she agrees to help Caroline get her much-needed night guard from her old home.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dead Zone
programme.desc: While investigating a murder that has personal implications for Sanchez, the squad uncovers a much larger criminal operation. Meanwhile, Buzz comes face to face with someone that may have been present at his father's murder.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk Goes to the Hospital
programme.desc: Monk goes to the emergency room for a bloody nose, but when a doctor in the hospital turns up dead, Monk joins the murder investigation and soon his own life is in grave danger.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen: Ed Helms
programme.desc: Segment features Ed Helms and Patti Harrison, Ruby Rose, David Alan Grier, Alexander Skarsgard, Sara Waisglass and Felix Mallard, Nick Jonas, Vargus Mason, Bobby Cannavale, Colin Farrell, Kristen Wiig and Sofia Carson.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Cosplay/ My Movers Cheated Me
programme.desc: Student sues roommate over damaged costume; woman sues moving company over bill.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: My Daughter and the Gambling Boyfriend
programme.desc: Plaintiff sues over the excessive use of a vehicle.

programme.title: Protection Court: The Therapy Helped Us/ God Is My Lawyer
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Christmas From Hell/ Grant Me My Money
programme.desc: Disagreement over Christmas display; woman sues over non-profit grant.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Hicks vs. Smith
programme.desc: An Arkansas man rejects his girlfriend's three-month-old daughter after hearing rumors that another man is the father.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Calhoun vs. Proutt
programme.desc: A Texas man claims he felt pressured into signing the birth certificate for his girlfriend's baby girl, but was recently told he is not her father.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Brandon is suing Michael for rent, but Michael doesn't feel obligated to pay Brandon as he was uncomfortable with the living conditions and even felt like living there was putting his health in peril.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Families in Court: A woman wants bail money back from her son after bailing him out of jail. In another case, the plaintiff believes she and the defendant may share the same father and wants a sibling DNA test.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Not Being Neighborly ' and 'Refusing to Return Money.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Having No Heart' and 'Letting a Lover Down.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Overextended Venue/ Handle With Care
programme.desc: Newlyweds are sued by wedding venue; a valuable gramophone is damaged.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Cornelious says that Daphne owes him money for three months of back rent, property damage and the cost of a process server. Daphne insists that conditions were rancid and that he was renting her an unsafe unit and therefore owes nothing.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Dad, Did You Steal From Me?
programme.desc: Crystal suspects that a missing bracelet and necklace were in fact stolen from her. Additionally, Karla and her family accuse the ex-girlfriend of their deceased brother of theft, while Tamela accuses her sister Pamela of stealing money.

programme.title: Maury: Pregnant With Your Twins... The Wedding is Off if You Cheated!
programme.desc: Today, Daniesha claims to cherish the family she has with her boyfriend Deonte and their son. Her family is being threatened by their nosy neighbor Tocarra who spreading lies about Daniesha.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Baby Mamas Mistreated
programme.desc: Jordan made one big mistake in his relationship when he cheated on his girlfriend Miranda. But he feels guilty about it and wants to confess to Miranda.

programme.title: Maury: A One-Night Stand or My Ex-Husband ... Who's My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Abby wants to prove her baby's father is her ex-boyfriend Bradley, who's also denying his ex-wife's daughter. Roosevelt learned Jermesha cheated and now denies her four-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Leprechaun 2
programme.desc: Leprechaun's bride to be already has a boyfriend, so he plans on kidnapping her. Her boyfriend and his uncle comprise a plan to rescue her. When his uncle gets greedy the boyfriend is on his own leaping through Leprechaun's surprises.

programme.title: Movie: Leprechaun 3
programme.desc: When a college student acquires a lucky coin, he is stalked by a murderous leprechaun to whom it belongs.

programme.desc: A kidnapped child tells three horror stories in order to avoid being eaten by a cannibalistic witch.

programme.title: Movie: Battle of the Damned
programme.desc: After a deadly viral outbreak, private military soldier Max Gatling leads and handful of survivors and a team of robots against the infected army.

programme.title: Movie: Day of the Dead 2: Contagium
programme.desc: A barely contained 'zombie' bacteriological weapon from 1968 is re-released at a hospital.

programme.title: Movie: Terrordactyl
programme.desc: Ancient flying reptiles attack Los Angeles.
